title: Capcut / TikTok editor
description:
You will be editing and making Al videos using Al tools like Higgsfield.ai, Heygen, ElevenLabs, and VEO3. You will be generating video clips / Al characters talking and editing them in Capcut.



You will be trained extensively on how to do it, previous experience using CapCut is required but the other tools you don't need any experience in. It'll be mostly just providing scripts to an Al tool and then adding the voice to a capcut video. It's quite easy once you get the hang of it, which we'll train you to do!



IMPORTANT: To apply, please re-create this viral video using the following services and attach to your application: ---------- /t/ZT6cdHxTC/



1) Create an image similar to the one in the video attached above in Google Gemini (this is free)

2) Download the transcript from the video with this tool: www.submagic.co/tools/tiktok-transcript-generator

3) Create a free ElevenLabs account and run the script through ElevenLabs. Ensure the audio sounds realistic to the speaker's voice in the image you generated. Download the MP3.

4) Create a free HeyGen account. Using HeyGen, upload the MP3 as well as your image to generate the video.

5) Download the final file, add captions and text hooks just like in the viral video using Capcut and export.



Please attach these things in your application:

The google drive link to your Final Recreate Assignment (Make sure it's public or a link with access)



Requirements for the job:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Can work 8am - 5pm Manila time

Availability for 6-8h a day (never more, sometimes less)

Able to work 6 per week (can take days off whenever needed as long as mostly consistent)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



2nd test)



1) Create an image similar to the video (Go to Google Labs (Flow) VEO3), you can use nano banana pro 2.

2) Using that image animate the same video linked but as your own avatar.

2) Create an exact copy with the same setting but different face. 

3) Visual and text should sound identical. Both scripts should sound the same. (If he points up, your character should point up).

title: Shopify PageFly Designer & Conversion Specialist
description:
Zentra Digital is looking for an A-player Shopify/PageFly Designer.



We build high-converting Shopify stores and landing pages for e-commerce and DTC brands, and we are looking for someone who understands conversion-driven design, not just someone who can drag and drop sections into place. We need someone who thinks in buyer psychology, page flow and nice design with own initiative.



Responsibilities

- Design and build high-converting Shopify pages using PageFly as the primary page builder

- Create landing pages, product pages, collection pages, and homepage layouts optimized for conversions

- Build custom sections, templates, and reusable page components within PageFly

- Collaborate with the media buying and strategy team to align landing pages with ad creatives

- Work with Figma or Canva to design layouts before building them in PageFly



What We Expect From You

- You will primarily work with PageFly to build and customize Shopify pages. You need to know this tool inside and out. Custom sections, liquid snippets, responsive settings, integrations with Shopify's native features, and how to push PageFly beyond its default templates.

- Experience with conversion rate optimization is essential, because we don't just build pages that look nice — we build pages that sell. 



Part of your role will also include reviewing competitor stores, analyzing top-performing landing pages, and proactively suggesting design improvements based on data and best practices. As a small note to confirm applicants actually read the description carefully, please include the words White Worm somewhere in your application message.



Requirements

- Strong experience with PageFly (this is our primary page builder — you must know it well)

- Solid understanding of Shopify and its ecosystem (themes, apps, liquid basics)

- Understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) and direct response design principles

- Design skills using, Canva, or similar tools for design and layout planning

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with quick turnaround times



Who We Are Looking For? We are looking for A-players only!

- You take ownership of every page you build and treat it like your own store

- You think about performance and conversions, not just aesthetics

- You're detail-oriented — pixel-perfect spacing, consistent styling, and flawless mobile views matter to you

- You 

- You're comfortable working in a fast-moving e-commerce environment where results matter more than opinions

- You want to grow long term with a serious team 





What We Offer?

- Full-time remote position with flexible working hours

- Long-term opportunity with Zentra Digital

- Opportunity to grow in the company 

- Performance-based bonuses and incentives

- Work on high-revenue Shopify stores for scaling e-commerce and DTC brands

- Direct collaboration with experienced media buyers, strategists, and funnel builders



And of course;  a warm, welcoming environment where you genuinely feel like part of the team, not just another contractor on a list



If u are interested, please send:

1. Examples of Shopify pages or landing pages you've built (preferably using PageFly)

2. A short introduction about you, your experience and why you'd be a great fit

3. Your availability and prefer working hours per month





We look forward to hearing from you!



Kind regards,



The Zentra Digital Team

).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Part-Time Virtual Video Designer
description:
We are seeking a Part-Time Virtual Video Designer to work remotely, creating visually stunning video content that explores the beauty of various countries while showcasing YOOFU’s cultural exchange events and curriculum. As a Video Designer, you’ll play a key role in bringing our mission to life. Flexibility in working hours and a collaborative team spirit are essential, as you’ll be working with an international team across different time zones.

*Collaborate closely with remote tea
mbers, including video editors, content creators, and project managers, ensuring effective communication and teamwork.

*Ensure that all video designs and posters align with YOOFU’s brand and global mission.

*Flexibility in working hours to meet deadlines and collaborate across time zones.

Preferred:

Work Environment:

This is a part-time, fully remote position. Flexibility and strong communication are required to collaborate effectively with our international team. You will manage your hours, ensuring you meet project deadlines and contribute actively to team discussions.



How to Apply:

Submit your resume, portfolio, and a brief cover letter to this platform. We’re excited to see how your creativity can help showcase the beauty of global cultural exchanges!

title: Recruiter
description:
We're looking for someone who can help us with the hiring process of new employees. It'd involve discussing the requirements with us, asking questions, and getting a good idea of what we really need for the role... then you'd write and post the job on OJPH (if freelancer) otherwise Breezy/Indeed/etc if W-2 (we're US-based), then sort through the applicants and have chat conversations as an initial screening.  You'll do some online research on the candidates (ensuring there's no red flags on their social media), and those that pass through your initial text conversations/questions will be pushed to our freelancer platform for a direct company application (helping them through it), then scheduled for a Zoom call where you'll interview them face-to-face, filling out an internal applicant assessment on each of them.  And finally the ones you like best get scheduled for an interview with someone senior from our company for the final round.  



Basically the role is primarily focused around you searching for, finding, and filtering down the candidates, helping us save a lot of time by only scheduling interviews with the people you recommend.  Then you'll help with their initial onboarding, setting the new hires up for success with our company.



This is a long-term, full-time role that pays about $600 per month (600*12/52 or $139/wk salary paid via Wise each Monday), plus $100 per hired person after they stay for 90 days (good fit).  Some months should earn you $
, and the better months will earn $1,100-$1,200, depending on how much hiring we're actively doing.



Thank you!

title: Facebook Structures VA
description:
About Us



Structure Flows is a service built around providing reliable
 advertising infrastructure to media buyers and agencies who depend on clean, stable setups to run their operations. We supply Business Managers, ad accounts, profiles, and Pages, and we handle all of our client communication and delivery through 
. As we continue to grow, we need someone who can step in and take ownership of the client-facing delivery process while helping us stay organized behind the scenes.



The Role



We're looking for someone who genuinely understands
 infrastructure, not just from an advertising perspective, but from a structural one. You'll be the person our clients interact with when their orders are being prepared and delivered, so you need to be able to speak confidently about Business Managers, profiles, Pages, and account health. On a day-to-day basis, you'll be delivering completed structures to clients through our 
 server, answering their questions, walking them through setups when needed, and making sure every delivery is logged and tracked properly in our internal dashboard. 



This is a daily role that requires your attention seven days a week. On most days you can expect to spend somewhere between two and four hours on tasks and communication, though some days will be lighter depending on order volume and client activity. It's not a traditional nine-to-five position, but it does require consistency. Clients expect timely responses and deliveries don't pause for weekends, so we need someone who can commit to being available and responsive every single day.



What We're Looking For



The most important thing is that you have real, hands-on experience with
's advertising infrastructure. You should know what goes into building and maintaining a Business Manager, how profiles function within that ecosystem, and what makes a structure more or less likely to survive long-term. If you've worked in an agency environment, managed multiple BMs, or been involved in any kind of account provisioning or recovery work, that's exactly the background we're after. On top of that, you need to be a clear and professional communicator, since you'll be talking to clients daily through 
 and everything you say reflects on us. Strong written English is a must.



Beyond
 knowledge, we strongly prefer candidates who are already comfortable using 
 in a work or community support setting, who can navigate Google Sheets without needing hand-holding, and who have experience with project management tools like ClickUp. None of these are dealbreakers on their own, but if you already know your way around all three, you'll hit the ground running much faster.



How to Apply

We want to see three things from you, and please include them in this order.



Start with a short motivation letter where you tell us why this role interests you and what makes you a good fit for Structure Flows specifically. We're not looking for something overly formal here, just give us a genuine sense of who you are and why you want in.



After that, include your resume along with any relevant past work experience. If you'
 worked with
 infrastructure, agency operations, or client delivery in any capacity, make sure that's clearly highlighted.



Finally, and this is the part that matters most, we need you to answer a short knowledge check in your own words. Explain what a Business Manager is and what an advertising profile is, and then walk us through how you would personally go about building a strong
 structure that minimizes the risk of getting banned. We use this section to filter out applicants who don't actually have the experience they claim. If your answer is vague or clearly pulled from a Google search, we'll know. But if you genuinely understand this space, this is your chance to stand out.



Applications that are missing any of these three sections will not be reviewed. We'd rather hear from fewer people who actually know what they're talking about than sift through a hundred generic applications.



Thank you for reading all until the end. 

Kind regards,

Neal Amand

title: Remote Executive Assistant — Operations, Training + Marketing Support
description:
MHPHC REMOTE EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT — JOB POSTING

For: OnlineJobs.ph

My Happy Place Home Care | Anderson, SC USA | Full-Time Remote





JOB TITLE

Remote Executive Assistant — Operations, Training + Marketing Support





ABOUT THE COMPANY

My Happy Place Home Care is a non-medical home care agency based in Anderson, South Carolina. We serve approximately 45 clients across 10 counties in Upstate South Carolina. Our mission is simple: we don't just provide care — we create peace.



We are a growing, systems-driven agency with documented SOPs, locked call handling scripts, a digital loop tracking system, a structured training program, and an active social media presence. We are looking for one sharp, reliable, long-term person who can learn our entire operation and become an extension of our leadership team.





ABOUT THE ROLE

This is not a task-based VA position. This is a long-term executive support role for someone who is highly organized, learns systems quickly, takes initiative, communicates with professionalism, and can handle multiple types of work in a single day.



You will learn our complete operating system — how we handle calls, how we track issues, how we document, how we train staff, and how we show up on social media. Over time you will take on a training role — helping onboard and develop new tea
mbers using our documented training modules. You will also support the leadership team with admin tasks, content creation, social media, audits, and other projects as needed.



The right person will become indispensable. This is a role you grow into — not a role you age out of.





YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES WILL INCLUDE



OPERATIONS SUPPORT

- Learn and execute our complete call handling system — 15 locked scripts, routing protocols, escalation procedures

- Cover phone operations when needed — fill in for Office Coordinator during absences

- Manage the daily loop tracker — open, update, and close issues

- Support Morning Launch and daily EVV review when needed

- Document calls and interactions per our locked standards



TRAINING SUPPORT

- Learn our full training system — Foundation modules and Tier 2 training modules

- Help onboard new employees using our documented training content

- Score calls using our Avoma call scorecard

- Assist with building and updating training materials as the agency grows



MARKETING AND SOCIAL MEDIA

- Create and schedule social media content across
, Instagram, and other platforms

- Write captions and posts aligned to MHPHC brand voice — warm, professional, never salesy

- Assist with recruitment marketing — job posts, caregiver outreach content

- Support community outreach content for referral partners and families



EXECUTIVE ADMIN SUPPORT

- Assist with audits — compliance tracking, document reviews, file checks

- Research tasks as assigned

- Help build and organize documents, SOPs, and training materials

- Calendar management and scheduling support for leadership

- Any other tasks assigned by the Care Specialist





WHAT YOU WILL BE TRAINED ON

- 15 locked call handling scripts and complete call flow

- MHPHC routing table and escalation protocols

- Universal Loop System — digital entry, tracking, and resolution

- AxisCare — scheduling, client profiles, EVV documentation

- Documentation standards — 3-component note structure, 13 approved categories

- MHPHC brand voice and social media standards

- Training module system — how we onboard and develop staff

- Avoma call scoring platform





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- Excellent spoken and written English — clear, warm, professional in all communication

- Strong social media skills — content creation, scheduling, platform management

- Experience in customer service, healthcare admin, or executive support preferred

- Highly organized and detail-oriented — you catch errors before they become problems

- Ability to follow structured systems precisely and also think independently when needed

- Tech-savvy — comfortable learning new platforms quickly

- Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

- Long-term commitment — we invest heavily in training and expect you to grow with us

- Available Monday through Friday 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST with flexibility





WHAT WE OFFER

- Full-time remote position

- Competitive monthly salary based on experience

- Comprehensive structured onboarding — you will learn the entire system before working independently

- Weekly feedback and coaching

- Clear path to a senior role as the agency grows toward franchise expansion

- Long-term stable employment with a leadership team that invests in its people

- Opportunity to grow from assistant to trainer to operations lead over time





HOW TO APPLY

To be considered you must complete all three steps. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



STEP 1 — Voice Recording (Required)

Send a voice recording of 1 to 2 minutes introducing yourself and reading this sentence exactly as written:

"Thank you for calling My Happy Place Home Care. This is [Your Name]. Who do I have the pleasure of speaking with?"



STEP 2 — Written Questions (Required)

Answer all four questions:

1. Describe a time you followed a strict process or script at work. What was it and how did you handled it?

2. What does excellent customer service sound like on a phone call?

3. What social media platforms are you most experienced with and what kind of content have you created?

4. What hours are you available EST?



STEP 3 — Include Your Expected Monthly Salary in USD



Applications without the voice recording will not be reviewed.





My Happy Place Home Care

1638 N Main Street, Anderson, SC
"We don't just provide care — we create peace."

title: Creator & Community Partnerships Coordinator
description:
About the brand



CATSUMO is a fast-growing DTC cat toy brand based in San Francisco. We make sumo-themed wrestling glove puppets for cats — and our customers love us. We're scaling quickly and building a content engine to match. You'll be joining a small, fast-moving team where your work directly impacts growth.



About the role:



We're looking for a detail-oriented, proactive coordinator to own our UGC and outreach operations. This is a dual-function role covering creator/influencer outreach and community seeding (cat cafes, shelters, pet businesses). You'll be the person who keeps our content pipeline full and our partnerships organized.



What you'll do:



Research and build targeted lists of micro-influencers and UGC creators in the cat/pet niche

Send personalized outreach, follow up consistently, and manage relationships

Coordinate product seeding — briefing creators, tracking shipments, collecting content

Research and outreach to cat cafes and animal shelters for product partnerships

Manage a content tracker to keep deliverables, deadlines, and usage rights organized

Send and track content usage agreements for all seeding partners

Coordinate with our 3PL fulfillment team to ship product to partners



What we're looking for:



Strong written English — your outreach messages represent our brand

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Fast responder who can iterate quickly and communicate proactively

Experience with influencer outreach, PR seeding, or community management is a plus

Comfortable with Google Sheets, Gmail, and basic research tools

Genuine love of cats is a real bonus

Paid test assignments — $20 USD each

Before we move to interviews, all applicants complete two short paid assignments. These are real tasks that reflect your day-to-day work. Quality, speed, and communication during the assignment are all evaluated.



Assignment 1 — UGC & influencer outreach



$20 USD on completion



Find 20 micro-influencers or UGC creators in the cat/pet niche who would be a strong fit to receive a free CATSUMO product in exchange for content. Then write a ready-to-send outreach message we could use as a template.



Deliverable:



1. Share a Google Sheet with 20 creators — name, handle, platform, follower count, engagement rate, why they're a good fit

2. Draft an outreach message template (DM and
 format)



We'll evaluate on:



Quality of creator selection — do they actually fit the brand?

Accuracy and format of Google Sheet

Outreach message quality and tone -- is it something a real person would respond to?

Turnaround time and communication during the task



Assignment 2 — Cat cafe & animal shelter seeding



$20 USD on completion



Research cat cafes and animal shelters across the US that would be strong candidates to receive complimentary CATSUMO products.



Deliverables:



1. Share a Google Sheet with 20 venues — name, location, contact
 or form link, Instagram handle (if any), follower count, why they're a good fit.

2. Draft an outreach
 template that introduces CATSUMO, offers a free product, and asks for content/photos in return. Requests permission for any footage to be used in paid ads.



We'll evaluate on:



Quality of venue selection — active, social-media-present, cat-focused

Accuracy and completeness of contact information

Accuracy and format of Google sheet

 tone — warm, genuine, and brand-appropriate

Turnaround time and proactive communication



How to apply:



Send a short introduction telling us about yourself and any relevant experience. If you've done influencer outreach, PR seeding, or community coordination before — tell us about it. No long cover letters needed. We value clarity and directness. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Real Estate Sales & Outreach VA — AI-Assisted
description:
We don't hire closers. We hire people who give a damn.



We are Nexus Motion Studios. Real estate agents send us their listing photos and we deliver 12 professional videos by the next afternoon — vertical for Reels and TikTok, horizontal for 
 and
. One upload. Done by tomorrow.



Here's how we think about sales:



Every agent you talk to is running a business. They're trying to win listings, impress clients, and stand out in a market full of agents doing the same thing. Our job is not to sell them something — it's to genuinely help them. That means every conversation adds value whether they buy or not. Share a tip about what's working on listing videos right now. Tell them what makes a Reel actually get views. Point them in the right direction even if that direction isn't us.



The agents who feel helped become customers. The ones who become customers come back. The ones who come back refer others. That's the business we're building.



If it's not the right fit we say so and move on. We would rather lose a sale than damage someone's trust.



That mindset is non-negotiable here. If you're motivated purely by closing numbers this is not the right role.



If you believe that doing right by the customer is what builds a real business — keep reading.



What you do daily:

— Send 100+ outreach messages to agents via Instagram, LinkedIn, and

— Use our AI tool to personalize every message in 30 seconds

— Have real conversations — not scripts

— Share example videos and let the work speak for itself

— Give value in every interaction whether they order or not

— Follow up with patience until they're ready — or not

— Move every lead through GoHighLevel CRM



You are the right fit if:

— You believe the best sale is one where the customer wins

— You have sales, BPO, or outreach experience

— You already use at least one AI tool regularly

— You follow up every day without being chased

— You work independently and take ownership

— Strong written English is non-negotiable



Details:

— Full time 40hrs/week

— $6/hr paid weekly via Wise

— Monday to Friday

— All tools provided

title: Social Media Video Reviewer
description:
We're a personal branding agency that has helped clients generate millions of views over the past 3 years. We work with founders and business owners to turn their expertise into content that grows their brand and gets real results.



As we scale, we're looking for a Video Reviewer who understands what makes content perform on both Instagram Reels and YouTube and can help us keep our quality high across every client.



???? WHAT YOU'LL DO



• Review edited videos from our editing team before they go live both short form (Reels) and long form (YouTube)

• Check for typos, color, audio, formatting, and overall quality

???? WHY WORK WITH US



We've been doing this for 3 years, we know what works, and we'll train you on our process and standards. This isn't a role where you just check boxes we want your input. If you see something that could make a video better, we want to hear it.



If you love content, care about quality, and want to be part of a growing team let's talk.

title: US Payroll Compliance Manager
description:
The Role



Job Title: US Payroll Compliance Manager



This is a full-time remote role for a U.S. Payroll Compliance Manager, specializing in U.S. labor compliance and prevailing wage regulations. The U.S. Payroll Compliance Manager is responsible for ensuring accurate and compliant payroll processing for projects governed by prevailing wage laws. This role focuses on certi?ed payroll reporting, prevailing wage compliance, and ensuring adherence to U.S. Federal, State, and local labor regulations.



Key Responsibilities:



Certified Payroll & Compliance



• Review weekly certified payroll for employees on prevailing wage projects, verifying accuracy in wage determinations, fringe benefit allocations, and overtime calculations

• Maintain up-to-date knowledge of U.S. federal (IRA), state, and local prevailing wage laws

• Ensure accurate tracking and reporting of fringe benefits to meet prevailing wage requirements

• Respond promptly to payroll discrepancies and employee inquiries regarding wages, deductions, and benefits



Certified Payroll Reporting



• Verify compliance with reporting requirements, including worker classifications, hours worked, and applicable wage rates

• Maintain organized and detailed records of all certified payroll submissions for audits and client requests

• Support internal and external audits by preparing and providing required documentation and reports



Collaboration & Communication



• Collaborate with compliance managers, project managers, and accounting teams to ensure accurate and timely payroll processing

• Communicate effectively with contractors, subcontractors, and clients to resolve payroll or reporting-related issues

• Participate in cross-departmental meetings to align payroll practices with project and compliance goals



Skills and Knowledge



• Comprehensive knowledge of prevailing U.S. wage laws, certi?ed payroll requirements, and labor regulations is a plus but not required

• Pro?ciency in certi?ed payroll systems (e.g., LCPtracker, eMars, or similar) is a plus but not required

• Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel, including formulas, pivot tables, and data analysis

• Strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and ability to manage multiple priorities

• Strong command of both verbal and written communication in English



Minimum Qualifications



• Bachelor’s degree in accounting, law, or related field (preferred)

• 5–10+ years’ experience with U.S. payroll, preferably as it relates to labor compliance and prevailing wage regulations within the construction, staffing, or government contracting industries (a plus but not required)

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment

• Ability to work in U.S. hours (Pacific Time)





Job Types: Full-time, Permanent



Benefits:

• Pay raise

• Work from home

title: Job Title: SEO Specialist for Shopify Furniture Store (On-Page, Off-Page & Technical SEO)
description:
**Job Title:** Senior SEO Specialist for Shopify Furniture Store (On-Page, Off-Page & Technical SEO)



**Company:** SoftSeason Furniture

**Website:** 

**Location:** Remote (OnlineJobs.ph)



**About Us**



SoftSeason Furniture is an e-commerce furniture brand based in Canada. We sell high-quality dining sets, massage chairs, and modern furniture. Our website and SEO foundations are already set up, and we are now looking for an experienced **Senior SEO Specialist** to help audit, optimize, and scale our organic traffic.



This is a **long-term remote position** for the right candidate.



---



**Scope of Work**



**Technical SEO**



* Perform a full technical SEO audit

* Identify and fix crawl errors, indexing issues, and site structure problems

* Improve page speed and Core Web Vitals

* Optimize Shopify technical SEO settings

* Ensure proper sitemap, robots.txt, and schema markup



**On-Page SEO**



* Advanced keyword analysis for product and collection pages

* Optimize titles, meta descriptions, headings, and internal linking

* Improve existing product page SEO

* Optimize collection/category pages for higher rankings



**Off-Page SEO**



* Build high-quality backlinks

* Outreach for guest posting opportunities

* Competitor backlink analysis

* Authority building through relevant websites



---



**Requirements**



* Proven experience in **e-commerce SEO**

* Strong experience with **Shopify SEO**

* Advanced knowledge of **technical SEO**

* Experience using tools like **Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4**

* Ability to perform deep SEO audits and provide optimization strategies

* Strong communication and reporting skills



---



**Important Requirement**



**This position requires a SENIOR SEO specialist. We already have the basic SEO structure in place and are looking for someone who can perform advanced audits and optimization. This is NOT a beginner position. Please DO NOT apply if you are a junior SEO specialist.**



---



**Proof of Experience (Required)**



To apply, you must provide **real examples of your previous SEO work**, including:



* Websites you worked on

* **Before and after SEO results**

* Examples of ranking improvements

* Traffic growth or keyword ranking results



Applications without examples of **before-and-after SEO results will not be considered.**



---



**How to Apply**



Please include the following:



1. **Your resume (required)**

To confirm you read this job post, please start your application with the word **SoftSeason**.

title: Executive VA / Business Development Associate
description:
Role Overview



We’re seeking a highly organized, proactive, and systems-minded Business Development & Growth Associate to support our founder and internal team while helping drive sustainable business growth. This is not a sales role. Instead, this person will focus on improving how we attract, onboard, support, and retain clients; while anticipating the needs of the CEO and team to keep operations running smoothly.



Our company is a mission-driven SaaS platform led by a Senior Software Engineer with a strong commitment to social impact. The ideal candidate will function as a strategic right hand - helping streamline workflows, improve client communication, strengthen our online presence, and ensure thoughtful follow-through across the customer lifecycle.



This role blends business development, client experience, internal operations, and growth strategy, and is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems, supporting people, and making things work better.







Key Responsibilities



Business Development & Growth Support

	•	Support business growth by proactively engaging warm leads, including individuals and organizations that sign up on our platform, to guide them through onboarding and increase conversion to paid clients.

	•	Conduct regular follow-ups with clients after demos, during onboarding, re-engagement periods, and periodic check-ins to ensure they feel supported and informed.

	•	Send thoughtful, thorough follow-up
s after demo calls, clearly summarizing discussions, next steps, and value, even in the absence of senior tea
mbers.

	•	Develop a strong understanding of our product in order to clearly explain features, use cases, and benefits to clients when needed.



Client Experience & Communication

	•	Schedule and manage CEO and team sales/demo calls, ensuring smooth coordination and preparation.

	•	Serve as a consistent point of contact for clients during early engagement and onboarding phases.

	•	Leverage AI tools to draft newsletters and client communications highlighting newly released features, product updates, and team milestones.

	•	Maintain a high standard of professionalism, warmth, and clarity in all client-facing communication.



Internal Operations & Team Support

	•	Anticipate the needs of the CEO and internal team, proactively handling logistics, scheduling, and follow-through.

	•	Manage internal resources, track tasks, and help ensure projects move forward efficiently.

	•	Support internal research initiatives that contribute to SEO improvement, content strategy, and growth opportunities.

	•	Help streamline processes, documentation, and workflows to reduce friction for the team.



Marketing & Growth Enablement

	•	Schedule and manage social media content aligned with product launches, feature updates, and brand storytelling.

	•	Assist with research and execution of content ideas that support SEO, discoverability, and inbound growth.

	•	Collaborate with tea
mbers to ensure messaging is consistent, accurate, and aligned with the product.







Skills & Qualifications

	•	Strong organizational skills with the ability to anticipate needs and take initiative.

	•	Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with attention to clarity, tone, and follow-through.

	•	Ability to understand and explain SaaS products in a clear, client-friendly way.

	•	Comfort using AI tools to enhance productivity (writing, research, summaries, content creation).

	•	Experience supporting client onboarding, customer success, or business operations is a plus.

	•	Tech-savvy and comfortable using collaboration, scheduling, CRM, and project management tools.

	•	Ability to work independently, prioritize effectively, and manage multiple workstreams.

	•	Growth-oriented mindset with an interest in improving systems and processes.







Work Hours & Availability (Required)

	•	This role requires full availability from 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time (EST), Monday through Friday.

	•	Candidates must be able to work synchronously during these hours to support live meetings, internal coordination, and client communications.

	•	Please apply only if you can consistently commit to this schedule, regardless of location.







Application Instructions

	•	Please include the phrase “Lantern” in the subject of your cover letter to demonstrate attention to detail.

	•	Complete the free personality test at 16 Personalities and include your results in your application.

	•	Submit a short video (under 3 minutes) introducing yourself, explaining why you’re interested in this role, and showcasing your workspace.







How to Apply



Fill in your application at the Google Forms link here:



Any applications not submitted though this link will automatically be disqualified.

You will be required to upload:

	•	Your resume

	•	Cover letter

	•	Personality test results

	•	Application video link

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
About Us: The Link Housing is a dynamic and rapidly growing real estate company dedicated to providing exceptional rental properties to our clients. We pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence and our passion for helping individuals and families find their perfect home.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join our team. As a Virtual Assistant, you will play a key role in our real estate operations by assisting with the acquisition of homes for rent. This is a remote position with flexible hours within the Eastern Time Zone.



Responsibilities:



Make phone calls to potential homeowners to inquire about listing their properties for rent.

Gather and organize relevant information using Google Sheets.

Assist with administrative tasks and documentation related to property acquisition.

Provide excellent customer service to homeowners and potential clients.



Key Responsibilities:



Source suitable housing options within a 10-mile radius of the displaced residence using platforms like Airbnb, Zillow, and Furnished Finder.

Utilize Google Maps to center searches on target locations, ensuring proximity, quality, and availability.

Conduct outbound calls to property owners and landlords to negotiate rental agreements and advocate for displaced families.

Submit accurate, comprehensive property listings for internal review, including pricing, amenities, location, and owner contact information.

Maintain a high standard of professionalism in written and spoken English when communicating with landlords and internal teams.

Accurately log and track submissions and activities using Google Sheets, Google Docs, and 
.

Work efficiently in a fast-paced environment, balancing speed, accuracy, and customer satisfaction.

Apply negotiation and sales skills to encourage property owners to list their homes for temporary housing.



Key Skills & Requirements:

Proficiency with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Maps)

Strong experience using OTA (Online Travel Agency) platforms: Airbnb, Furnished Finder, Zillow

Excellent understanding of geolocation and map-based search techniques

Strong communication skills – both verbal and written (professional English)

Ability to work independently and manage time across multiple cases

Knowledge of 
 or similar project management tools

Sales and negotiation experience is essential

Must be available to work Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours



Ideal Candidate:



You are tech-savvy, detail-focused, and mission-driven. You’re passionate about helping families in need, and you thrive in a remote, fast-paced environment where accuracy, speed, and empathy matter. You’re also proactive, highly organized, and confident in negotiating terms with landlords.



Requirements:

Bachelor's degree in a related field.

Strong communication skills and comfortable making phone calls.

Proficiency in Google Sheets or similar spreadsheet software.

Detail-oriented with excellent organizational skills.

Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks effectively.



Benefits:



Competitive salary based on experience with Monthly Bonus Opportunity

Remote work opportunity with the potential for growth within the company.



Please review the application details below. Applications with missing requirements will not be considered.



1. Submit your resume and a cover letter outlining your qualifications and why you would be a great fit for this position.



2. Include a photo of your computer set up. In the photo, please have 
 opened on your computer Monitor. In your cover letter, please change the font color of the date to red. Lastly, please highlight the last sentence of the cover letter in yellow.



3. Lastly, please upload a video or voice recording of the script:


 



We thank all applicants for their interest in joining The Link Housing, however, only those selected for an interview will be contacted.

title: App Developer
description:
**Job Title: App Developer (Adalo / Custom Development)**



We are seeking an experienced app developer to support a short-term, project-based engagement focused on completing a partially built application. The project may involve working within Adalo or rebuilding/finishing the app using custom code, depending on the developer’s expertise and recommended approach.



The primary objective is to take an existing concept and partially completed work and bring it to a functional, usable state within a tight timeline.



Scope of Work:



* Review the current state of the application (Adalo or existing assets)

* Complete remaining development to achieve a functional app

* Build or refine core features, workflows, and user experience

* Ensure the app is stable, responsive, and ready for use or testing

* Provide basic guidance or documentation for handoff if needed



Key Responsibilities:



* Complete app development efficiently within a short timeframe (approximately one week)

* Identify gaps or issues in the current build and resolve them

* Recommend the most effective path forward (Adalo vs. custom development)

* Deliver a clean, functional, and user-ready product

* Communicate clearly on progress, blockers, and timelines



Ideal Candidate:



* Proven experience building apps using Adalo and/or custom development (web or mobile)

* Strong understanding of app structure, user flows, and UI/UX fundamentals

* Ability to work quickly without sacrificing quality

* Problem-solving mindset with the ability to take ownership of incomplete work

* Reliable communication and responsiveness



This is a short-term gig with a focused timeline of approximately one week, with the potential for additional development work based on performance and project needs.

title: Video Project Editor
description:

The scope of work includes editing multiple speaker presentations into clean, polished videos suitable for internal use, marketing, and distribution. This will involve trimming content, improving audio clarity, adding basic graphics (such as lower thirds, titles, and transitions), and ensuring a consistent, professional look across all videos.



In addition, the editor will be responsible for creating a series of short-form social media clips derived from the longer presentations. These clips should be engaging, concise, and optimized for platforms such as LinkedIn, Instagram, and
. The goal is to extract key 
nts, insights, and soundbites that can be used to promote thought leadership and brand visibility.



Key Responsibilities:



* Edit long-form speaker videos into clean, professional presentations

* Enhance audio and video quality where needed

* Add branding elements, titles, and simple motion graphics

* Identify and extract high-impact 
nts for short-form content

* Produce multiple social-ready clips (typically 15–60 seconds)

* Maintain consistency in style, pacing, and formatting across all deliverables



Ideal Candidate:



* Proven experience editing both long-form and short-form content

* Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual clarity

* Ability to follow brand direction and maintain consistency

* Familiarity with social media content formats and trends

* Reliable turnaround times and clear communication



This is a gig-based project with the potential to transition into ongoing, long-term work for the right fit.

Our products are used widely in the cooking and barbecue space, and therefore we are trying to expand our brand awareness across the food industry.  Our products are sold to backyard grilling, cooking and barbecue enthusiasts on 



Responsible for planning, creating, executing, and optimizing paid advertising campaigns across major social media platforms (Meta/Facebook & Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, Pinterest, and others) to drive brand awareness, lead generation, traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop and manage end-to-end paid social campaigns, including audience research, targeting, budgeting, bidding strategies, and ad creative development/testing.

- Set up, monitor, and optimize campaigns in platform tools like Meta Ads Manager, LinkedIn Campaign Manager, and TikTok Ads Manager.

- Conduct A/B testing on ad creatives, copy, landing pages, and audiences to improve key performance metrics (e.g., ROAS, CTR, CPC, CPA, conversions).

- Collaborate with our internal creative team to integrate tweaks to creative content based on lessons learned from ad performance

- Forecast budgets, track spend, and ensure efficient allocation to maximize ROI while staying within guidelines.

- Stay current with platform algorithm changes, ad policies, trends, and best practices in paid social advertising.

- Report on results to leadership or clients, including dashboards and recommendations for scaling successful campaigns.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

- 2–5+ years of hands-on experience managing paid social media campaigns with proven results in driving performance metrics.

- Experience with creative strategy, copywriting for ads, and basic analytics (Google Analytics,
 Pixel, etc.).

- Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven optimizations.

- Excellent project management and communication skills.

title: Experienced Bookkeeper & Payroll Specialist
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based tax and accounting firm serving entrepreneurs and business owners across the country. We are looking for a high-level, experienced bookkeeper who can take ownership of client accounts, communicate professionally, and keep financials clean, accurate, and on time.



This is NOT an entry-level role. We are looking for someone who already understands bookkeeping, accounting, and payroll at a strong level and can think independently.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



Managing monthly bookkeeping for multiple clients (QuickBooks Online)

Categorizing transactions accurately and consistently

Performing bank and credit card reconciliations

Cleaning up messy books and catching errors

Preparing and reviewing Profit & Loss statements and Balance Sheets

Processing and managing payroll (including basic payroll compliance)

Communicating directly with clients via
 and occasional calls

Requesting missing documents and following up with clients

Ensuring all books are up-to-date monthly (no delays)



What We’re Looking For:



Strong experience with QuickBooks Online

Proven experience with bookkeeping + payroll

Solid understanding of accounting principles

Excellent English (written and spoken) — you will be client-facing

Strong attention to detail (you catch mistakes others miss)

High level of common sense and problem-solving ability

Organized and able to manage multiple clients at once

Proactive communicator (you don’t wait to be told what to do)

Reliable, consistent, and professional



Nice to Have (Bonus):



Experience working with U.S.-based clients

Experience with cleanup projects

Familiarity with tax preparation support

Experience using tools like Slack, Google Drive, or project management systems



What Success Looks Like:



Books are clean, accurate, and delivered on time every month

Clients feel taken care of and communicated with

Issues are identified and solved before they become problems

You take ownership — not just follow instructions



How to Apply:

To be considered, include the following:

title: Virtual Assistant- Operations & Client Success Manager
description:
Virtual Assistant – Operations & Client Success Manager

Full-Time | US Hours Required (10am–6pm or 11am–7pm EST) | Remote



About Alia’s Tax Prep

Alia’s Tax Prep is a fast-growing, faith-based tax and financial advisory firm serving entrepreneurs, business owners, and high-income individuals. We don’t just file taxes — we help clients save money, build wealth, and gain financial clarity. We are sales-oriented, execution-driven, and obsessed with client results. We move fast, we hold a high standard, and we operate with excellence.



We are looking for a high-level Virtual Assistant who will function as the Operations & Client Success Manager — the execution engine of the company and the CEO’s right hand.



This is not a basic admin role. This is for someone who thrives on responsibility, ownership, and making things happen.



Role Overview

This role is responsible for keeping Alia’s Tax Prep running smoothly on a daily basis. You will manage clients, projects, systems, marketing execution, and follow-up — ensuring nothing falls through the cracks and everything moves forward.



You will wear many hats: client manager, project manager, admin, marketing support, and sales support. If something needs to get done, you make sure it happens.



Key Responsibilities



Client & Operations Management

• Own all active client files from onboarding to completion

• Ensure tax, bookkeeping, and planning work is completed on time

• Follow up relentlessly for missing documents, signatures, and payments

• Communicate clearly and professionally with clients

Project & Workflow Management

• Track all projects and deadlines inside Monday and GoHighLevel

• Coordinate between internal tea
mbers and vendors

• Identify bottlenecks and fix them



Marketing & Lead Support

• Post content on Instagram and TikTok

• Create social media graphics in Canva

• Build or update lead magnets, funnels, and automations

• Manage GoHighLevel workflows and follow-ups

• Help ensure marketing is consistent and effective



Sales & Revenue Support

• Follow up with leads

• Help book consultations

• Identify upsell opportunities (tax planning, bookkeeping, payroll, advisory)

• Support closing when needed

• Commission opportunities available if you help generate revenue



Who You Are



You are not passive. You are proactive.

You do not wait for instructions. You look for what needs to be done and do it.



• Extremely organized and detail-driven

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Strong communication and follow-up skills

• Confident speaking with clients

• Comfortable with sales and revenue conversations

• Calm under pressure and fast-paced environments

• Able to juggle multiple priorities

• Takes ownership and pride in execution

• Committed to excellence — not “good enough”



Required Skills & Tools



• GoHighLevel

• Canva

• Monday

• CRM and automation experience

• Strong copywriting and written communication

Preferred Experience

How Success Is Measured

• Clients are happy and informed

• Workflows are clean and organized

• The CEO’s time is protected

• Fewer mistakes, fewer fires, more 
ntum



Perks

• High growth and promotion potential

• Mission-driven company

• Commission opportunities

• Work directly with the CEO of a fast-growing firm



How to Apply



To apply, submit:



Your resume



Your portfolio or examples of past work



Examples of projects, client management, or systems you’ve built or managed



We are only considering candidates who can demonstrate strong execution, organization, and ownership.

title: Content Operations Manager — Personal Brand + Community
description:
CONTENT OPERATIONS MANAGER — PERSONAL BRAND + COMMUNITY

Full-time | Remote | Philippines | $1,500–$2,000 USD/month | PST hours + weekends



ABOUT THIS ROLE



This is a full-time, exclusive role supporting a globally recognized finance educator and content creator with 450K+ LinkedIn followers, a 40K+ newsletter, and a growing online Academy and executive community. You will be the operational backbone of how content gets created, published, and distributed — and how a high-value community of CEOs and executives experiences our platform every day.



This is not a 9-to-5 role and it is not for someone who needs to be managed. It is for someone who runs toward problems, operates with urgency, and uses AI not as a novelty but as the foundation of how they work. If you got comfortable in your last role, this is the wrong opportunity. If you are always looking for a faster, smarter way to do what you did yesterday, keep reading.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Manage our Circle community end-to-end — onboarding, events, engagement loops, member experience, and day-to-day moderation across multiple spaces and tiers

- Coordinate content across LinkedIn, our newsletter (Beehiiv), the Academy (Thinkific), and our Financiario brand — scheduling, repurposing, and publishing with zero errors

- Maintain and execute a content calendar across both personal brand (Oana Labes) and company brand (Financiario)

- Troubleshoot and deploy HTML — fix broken elements, update landing pages, push changes to live environments without waiting for a developer

- Build and improve AI-assisted workflows to increase output volume and reduce turnaround time — and proactively replace anything you built last month with something better this month

- Manage event logistics inside Circle — live sessions, replays, announcements, and follow-up sequences

- Flag issues before they escalate. Surface problems your employer doesn't know about yet. Be two steps ahead, always.



WHAT WE REQUIRE — NO EXCEPTIONS



- Demonstrated experience managing content for a personal brand with a significant following — LinkedIn, YouTube, newsletter, or similar. We will verify this. Vague claims will disqualify you.

- Proven experience managing an online community platform (Circle, Mighty Networks, Slack, 
) at an operational level — not just participation

- Ability to troubleshoot and fix HTML/CSS issues and deploy to live environments. This will be tested.

- Fluent, professional English — written and spoken. This role involves executive-facing communication.

- AI-native work style — you can demonstrate specific workflows you have built and measurably improved over time. "I use ChatGPT" is not sufficient.

- Notion proficiency — you use it to stay organized and can show how

- Available full-time, exclusively — no other clients, no side projects that compete for your attention during work hours

- Available during PST business hours and on weekends as needed. This is a high-output role.

- Minimum 2 years in a single role with a verifiable reference who will answer the phone



WHO YOU ARE



- You move fast and think clearly at the same time — speed without sloppiness

- You are organized by default, not by effort — your systems are tighter than your employer expects

- You take initiative and solve problems before reporting them — not the other way around

- You are loyal. You do not treat this as a stepping stone. You build something and you own it.

- You understand personal branding mechanics at a deep level — what makes content perform, why audiences grow, how community trust is built

- You are comfortable working in a monitored environment with tracked hours and clear output expectations — and you prefer it that way because you have nothing to hide

- You do not need to be the most creative person in the room. You need to be the most reliable and the fastest executor in the room.



COMPENSATION



$1,500–$2,000 USD per month depending on experience and demonstrated results. After a successful 90-day trial, a performance bonus structure applies based on output targets. This is a contractor arrangement. You are responsible for your own taxes and benefits. We pay on time, every time.



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application with the following:



1. A Loom video (90 seconds max) where you address each of these directly:

   - A personal brand or creator account you've managed and what you did there

   - A community platform you've operated (Circle, Mighty Networks, Slack, or similar)

   - An HTML or CSS fix you've deployed to a live environment

   - An AI workflow you've built that you actually use

   - How you use Notion to stay organized



2. Links to your LinkedIn profile, one community or account you've managed, and one piece of content you wrote yourself



3. One professional reference — a former employer or client — with a name and contact info

 sales

title: Creative Strategist & Production Coordinator (E-commerce)
description:
Creative Strategist & Production Coordinator (E-commerce)



We’re hiring a Creative Strategist & Production Coordinator to help us scale our paid creative output for Meta.



This role sits between creative strategy and execution. You will research winning ad concepts, identify ideas worth testing for our brand, adapt and write scripts, prepare voiceover and soundtrack drafts, create clear briefs for editors, and coordinate creator content production.



We’re looking for someone with strong creative taste, Meta ad understanding, good written English, and solid execution skills.



What You’ll Own



1. Creative Research & Strategy Support



You will research competitor and adjacent-brand ads, identify concepts and scripts that could work for our brand, and help build a clear pipeline of ideas worth testing. You should be able to recognize strong hooks, understand what makes an ad compelling, and think in terms of “same but different” rather than just copying what already exists.



2. Script Development



You will adapt winning concepts to our brand, write new scripts when needed, and create multiple hook variations for each concept. You should understand how to write for paid social, especially Meta, and know the difference between writing something that sounds good and writing something that is designed to convert.



3. Creative Assembly & Briefing



You will generate voiceovers, pair them with music, and assemble rough audio drafts that can be used for production. You will also turn concepts into clear, structured Notion briefs for editors, including line-by-line shot guidance, references, and relevant asset links. You should have enough editing sense to understand rhythm, pacing, and how a creative should come together.



4. Creator Coordination



You will help source creators for content batches following our SOPs, support outreach and follow-up, keep communication organized, and make sure deliverables are collected and stored properly. You should be comfortable coordinating moving parts, tracking progress, and helping maintain a reliable flow of fresh creator content.



Expected Deliverables :



The role is designed to support a consistent paid creative testing pipeline by following SOPs. The expected output includes:



- Consistent production of new video briefs (8 per month to start)

- Script development, voiceover generation, ongoing research

- 1 creator batch every 1–2 months, typically around 5 creators

- Creative Strategy research 



What We’re Looking For



You are likely a strong fit if you have experience working on Meta creatives for ecommerce brands and understand how paid social ads are structured to perform.



You should have:



- Experience with Meta /
 ad creatives

- strong understanding of hooks, angles, and direct-response creative

- good written English

- the ability to identify winning concepts and adapt them to a brand

- basic to strong editing skills

- Experience in following SOPs

- a good sense of rhythm, pacing, and creative flow

- strong organization and attention to detail

- the ability to turn ideas into clean, actionable briefs

- experience in DTC / ecommerce



Nice to Have



experience using DaVinci Resolve

experience with 11Labs or other voiceover tools

experience working with UGC creators / influencer coordination

experience building briefs in Notion



Payment



This role will start part-time (4 days a week, Monday to Thursday) moving toward full-time.

Compensation will depend on experience and proof of past results, but our initial target range is around $8/hour - $1024/month to start, with room to grow for the right person as results and responsibilities expand.



How to Apply



Please include:

a short note on your experience with Meta ad creatives

examples of ecommerce creative work you’ve been involved in

any relevant scriptwriting, creative strategy, editing, or briefing experience

tools you’ve used (for example: DaVinci, 11Labs, Notion, etc.)

title: Amazon Brand Manager & Brand Manager Intern
description:
AMAZON BRAND MANAGER



We are looking for a talented and versatile Amazon Brand Manager! If you think that you have what it takes to be successful in this role, we welcome you to apply!



Do you like going from one meeting to another with non-stop action and solving problems every day while managing 8 people? Where you are trying to please clients and juggling tons of competing priorities? If so, this is the job for you.



Brand Managers own the relationships at our agency. It’s your job to make customers like us while delivering our team’s accurate non-stop activities.



Responsibilities:

- Manage clients' accounts assigned. The Brand Manager will act as the direct point of contact for the client, responsible for coordinating MAGs services, implementing strategy, communicating with clients, direct reports, and leadership.

- 2+ Direct Reports. In addition to client services, this position is also a managerial position, and following the completion of training, brand managers will be expected to lead a small team of Amazon specialists, who will assist the manager with delivering MAG services to the client.

- Brand managers are the company's backbone, directly responsible for our client accounts.

- Proactively provide a strategy for the account, communicate with the client, and ensure MAG process and deliverables are met.

- Delegate tasks properly to your direct reports and the MAG teams, follow up on delegations, hold staff accountable, and report back to the client.



Qualifications:

- Amazon Expertise: 1+ year with Seller Central (flat files, FBA, PPC, SEO, reinstatements, brand registry, Helium10, keyword research).

- Agency & Management: Experience handling multiple demands, leading teams, hiring, and performance management.

- Project & Client Management: Skilled in multitasking, project management, client communication, and account ownership.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with tools like Zoom, Slack, Asana, and adapting in fast-changing environments.

- Passion for eCommerce: Independent, people-focused, and driven to grow client sales on Amazon.



Expectations:

- Competitive salary!

- Fun Fully Remote Culture – Community Culture, Team Oriented Environment

- You can have your OWN Amazon selling business and utilize company resources to build your own account! We love and ? encourage entrepreneurs, in fact, the majority of employees have their own selling accounts!

- Unlimited Learning and Growth – If you meet and exceed our core values and grow sales, you will have unlimited opportunities to grow, advance, promote, and earn more.

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- Permanent WFH setup

- The work schedule is in Eastern Standard Time (Monday to Friday only)

- A dual-monitor setup is required (at least 8GB of RAM)

- Good quality camera and microphone

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Must consistently maintain good performance and seek skills development for professional growth.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





AMAZON BRAND MANAGER INTERN



Want to catapult out of that “Walmart uniform” and into a world of digital marketing?



We're hiring a Brand Manager Intern at our agency. If you're a tech-savvy gamer who thrives amidst organized chaos, then you are the one that we are looking for!



We will train you how to manage people effectively, communicate better with clients, and navigate tools such as Slack smoothly, while you work at home on your computer. You also get to learn how to sell on Amazon which is the number 1 wealth generation platform in the USA for beginners.



Here's what you'd be doing with us:

- Mastermind core services like PPC, SEO, Design, Catalog merchandising, and troubleshoot like a pro.

- Take charge of at least 8-10 accounts in Seller Central Accounts under a Brand Manager.

- Be the communication bridge between clients and our agency.

- Train and mentor at least 2 AS Intern/BM Intern.

So what are you waiting for? Toss away that nametag and make the switch today.

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

You’ve got the talent—we’ve got the opportunity. Take control of your career and apply now!



For any questions or follow-ups,
 us at
