title: Senior DTC Video Editor
description:
Senior DTC AI Video Editor 



We are one of the fastest-growing supplement brands. Generating over 100m Views



Now, we're looking for an editor who wants to help us define what's next.



We're scaling the in-house team that created the playbook. We don't follow trends; we set them.



We're looking for an exceptional senior direct response video editor to join our innovative marketing department. This is your chance to work with a team of A-players, have a direct line to our founders, and create high-impact work that shapes the future of the industry. Top performers will be given opportunities to lead and grow with us.



YOUR MISSION

Your mission is to lead the production of our high-converting AI videos quickly and at high quality. You will be responsible for consistently creating on-brand and compliant video content based on proven formulas designed to maximize reach and conversions.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Produce a consistent volume of approximately 10 high-quality AI videos per day, following our preset scripts and styles.

Increase your performance bonus by analyzing prior video metrics to increase views and conversions.

Apply direct-response copywriting principles to review scripts.

Operate with a high degree of autonomy, managing your daily workload efficiently to meet deadlines without needing hand-holding or frequent check-ins.



Quickly learn and master new AI tools, software, and editing techniques as social media trends evolve, often with less than a day's notice.

Ensure every video meets our exacting quality standards and perfectly matches the provided instructions, minimizing the need for revisions.



Maintain clear, proactive communication with the company founders and executive team, providing updates when necessary.

As a foundational member of the team, you will be expected to help train and onboard future AI video editors to our standards.



OUR TECH STACK

Video Editing: CapCut Pro or Premiere Pro.

AI Video and Image Tools: HeyGen, Higgsfield, Veo 3, and other emerging platforms.

AI Audio Tool: ElevenLabs.

Communication & Project Management: Notion & Slack.

KPIs YOU WILL OWN

5 Daily Video Quota: at least 5 videos per day, delivered weekdays by 10PM ET.

90% First-Pass Approval Rate: At least 90% of submissions require no revisions.

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Proven experience creating short-form direct-response videos for DTC brands.

Proven experience with direct-response copywriting, ideally for short-form videos.

Proven experience with professional video-editing software is required. We have a strong preference for CapCut Pro, but proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro is also acceptable.

Experience with other AI video tools (HeyGen, Captions AI, etc.) is a major plus.

Strong conversational and written English skills for clear communication.



An autonomous operator with high agency who thrives without micromanagement.



A rapid learner who is genuinely excited by the fast-paced, ever-changing landscape of AI tools and social media trends.

Attention to detail; you follow instructions and believe in getting it right the first time.



WHY JOIN our brand



Performance-Based Rewards: A lucrative bonus structure that rewards you directly for every viral video you create. When your videos hit our views and conversion targets, you get a share in that success.



High Impact: Your work will directly contribute to campaigns seen by millions of people, shaping the public face of a leading brand.



Work with the Best: Join an A-player team that is defining the future of AI video marketing.



High Autonomy: We trust our team. You will be given the ownership to manage your process and deliver results.

Growth Trajectory: For high-performers, there are clear opportunities for advancement to lead editor or AI content manager roles.

Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.





THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

You are a meticulous video perfectionist who will spend hours refining a single transition or effect. With a high daily quota, success in this role demands efficiency. Adhering perfectly to the video template at speed is valued over spending extra time on minor details that don’t contribute to views or conversions.



You thrive in highly collaborative, team-oriented environments with frequent meetings and brainstorming sessions. This is a high-autonomy, "heads-down" role where you will be working independently the majority of the time to meet your individual production goals.

You are a methodical planner who prefers stable, long-term projects and predictable workflows. Our environment is inherently dynamic. The AI tools, guidelines, and video styles can change overnight, and you must be able to pivot instantly without frustration.

You are a dedicated specialist who prefers to master one skill or software. Our editors are multi-skilled operators who not only edit but also analyze data, review copy, and constantly learn new AI tools. This role requires a generalist's adaptability over a specialist's deep focus in one area.

You seek a strong separation between your work and personal interests. The ideal candidate is genuinely obsessed with the world of social media, AI, and direct-response marketing. This role is a poor fit if you see this as "just a job" and aren’t driven to grow with a fast-scaling company.



HOW TO APPLY

If you're an elite direct-response video editor who wants to work with the industry leaders, in a rapidly growing DTC company, with high-autonomy and an ambition to be excellent and grow beyond your role, we want to hear from you.

To stand out, answer all of the following questions in the application to the best of your ability and highlight how your past experience is applicable to this role.



Include the code word: 'DetailsMatter' somewhere in your application. We will only review candidates who follow these instructions. It tells us you actually pay attention to detail.

 

This is a remote job opportunity.

title: Social Media Manager & Video Editor
description:
Own the Content. Drive the Growth. Shape the Brand.



This is NOT just a video editing job.



This is NOT just a social media posting job.



This is a growth role.



If you:



- Know how to turn raw content into engaging, high-performing videos

- Understand what makes people click, watch, and stay

- Want real ownership in a fast-scaling brand



Keep reading.



Who We Are:



We’re a rapidly growing finance content brand with 500,000+ YouTube subscribers, known for high-value, strategic content.



We’re building a world-class content engine across YouTube, Instagram, and short-form platforms—and we need someone who can own it, execute it, and scale it.





Your Role:



As our Content & Social Media Lead, you will combine:



- Video Editing

- Content Strategy

- Social Media Management

- You will own the entire content lifecycle—from idea to execution to performance.





Your work will directly impact:

- Audience growth

- Engagement and retention

- Brand authority

- Revenue





Responsibilities:



1. Video Editing & Content Production

- Edit 1–2 long-form YouTube videos per week

- Create 14+ short-form videos weekly (Reels, Shorts, etc.)

- Optimize videos for:

   > Strong hooks (first 1–3 seconds)

   > Retention and pacing

   > Watch time and engagement

- Add captions, b-roll, zooms, and sound effects

- Continuously improve edits based on performance



2. Content Strategy & Planning

- Plan and manager weekly and monthly content calendars

- Develop platform-specific strategies (YouTube & short-form)

- Identify trends and viral opportunities

- Align content with brand positioning and growth goals



3. Social Media Management

- Publish and manage content across platforms

- Write high-converting titles, captions, and descriptions

- Engage with audience (comments, DMs)

- Maintain a consistent and strong brand voice 



4. Content Repurposing

- Turn long-form videos into short-form clips

- Identify viral, emotional, and high-value 
nts

- Create platform-native content (not just cutdowns)



5. Performance Tracking & Optimization

- Analyze views, retention, and engagement

- Improve content using data (not guesswork)

- Test ideas and scale what works



6. Workflow & Ownership

- Own and manage the full content pipeline

- Stay organized with assets, files, and timelines

- Deliver consistently and on time

- Operate with minimal supervision and high accountability

- Help scale output without sacrificing quality





Requirements:



- 3+ years experience in:

- Video editing (short-form and long-form)

- Social media or content marketing

- Strong skills in CapCut, After Effects, or Final Cut Pro

-Deep understanding of:

  > Hooks and retention

  > YouTube and Instagram algorithms

  > Performance-based editing

  > Proven portfolio (required)

- Experience managing or growing social media accounts

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Able to handle high-volume weekly output

- Full-time commitment only (no side jobs)

- Include the word “TAX” in your subject line  (Applications without this will be ignored)





Nice to Have:

- Experience with large YouTube or Instagram pages

- Background in finance, business, or education content

- Experience working with influencers or creators

- Knowledge of YouTube growth and analytics





How to Apply:



To be considered, send:

- Your resume

- Your portfolio (best edits)

- Youtube Channels you’ve managed or edited for if applicable.



- Links to:

   > Videos you’ve edited

   > Social media accounts you’ve managed (include metrics if possible)



Apply now and be part of a rapidly growing CPA Firm!

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 4b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Wordpress Designer/Developer - Part Time
description:
INTRODUCTION



We are looking for a senior WordPress designer and developer who can operate independently and take ownership of live production websites with minimal guidance.



This is not a support role and not a task-by-task position. You are expected to identify issues on your own, make correct design, development, and technical SEO decisions, and keep websites clean, consistent, and performing without needing step-by-step instructions.



You will work primarily with a Filipino-based team, so strong, clear English communication is required. You must be able to articulate decisions, explain issues, and collaborate efficiently. Initiative is non-negotiable.



If you need constant direction, detailed SOPs, or approval for obvious fixes, this role is not a fit.



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

-- Senior WordPress designer and developer with strong independent judgment

-- 7+ years of professional WordPress experience (10+ preferred)

-- Proven experience owning live production websites end to end

-- Strong written and spoken English

-- Comfortable articulating technical and design decisions clearly

-- Takes initiative and acts without waiting to be told

-- Comfortable working primarily with a Filipino team while communicating clearly with leadership

-- Disciplined with ClickUp and Hubstaff without supervision



RATE AND SCHEDULE

-- Rate: $14-16 USD per hour (based on autonomy and execution quality)

-- Hours: Approximately 15 to 20 hours per week

-- Part-time, ongoing role

-- Schedule flexible; Philippine time is acceptable



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

-- Independently manage ongoing WordPress website updates

-- Make design and layout decisions that maintain site-wide consistency

-- Publish, format, and QA content without supervision

-- Maintain and update themes, plugins, and site configurations

-- Proactively identify and resolve layout, performance, and technical issues

-- Use SEMrush to identify and fix technical SEO issues (404s, duplicate titles, missing tags, broken links, indexing issues, etc.)

-- Implement on-page SEO updates provided by the on-page SEO team accurately

-- Ensure websites remain fast, clean, stable, and visually consistent

-- Flag larger structural issues with clear recommendations, not open-ended questions

-- Track work accurately in ClickUp and Hubstaff



OWNERSHIP EXPECTATIONS

-- You are responsible for the quality, consistency, and health of assigned websites

-- You make execution decisions without waiting for approval

-- You proactively identify problems and fix them

-- You escalate only when a decision materially impacts scope, cost, or brand standards

-- You do not require detailed SOPs to deliver high-quality work



TOOLS YOU WILL USE

-- WordPress (core, themes, plugins)

-- Page builders such as Elementor or similar

-- HTML, CSS, and PHP (working proficiency)

-- SEMrush for technical SEO audits and fixes

-- ClickUp for task management

-- Hubstaff for time tracking

-- Internal on-page SEO guidelines



REQUIREMENTS

-- 7 to 10+ years of WordPress design and development experience

-- Deep understanding of WordPress themes, plugins, and page builders

-- Proven experience maintaining live production websites independently

-- Familiarity with SEMrush and fixing real technical SEO issues

-- Ability to implement on-page SEO instructions from an SEO team accurately

-- Strong design judgment and layout consistency instincts

-- High attention to detail and quality

-- Strong English communication skills

-- Able to work independently with minimal oversight

-- Reliable internet connection

-- Dedicated workstation with an external monitor



MUST HAVE

-- Long-term WordPress ownership experience (not just short-term projects)

-- Web design and development as your primary skill set

-- Experience fixing technical SEO issues identified in SEMrush

-- Ability to explain what you changed and why

-- Strong QA habits across desktop, mobile, and performance

-- Comfortable with strict task and time tracking



IMPORTANT NOTE

-- This role requires independent judgment and initiative

-- You will not receive step-by-step instructions

-- If you prefer highly structured SOPs or frequent guidance, this role is not a fit

-- If you are not comfortable fixing technical SEO issues, this role is not a fit



IDEAL PERSONALITY AND WORK STYLE

-- You take initiative and act decisively when something is clearly wrong

-- You are comfortable making judgment calls on live websites

-- You balance speed with accuracy and understand downstream impact

-- You have strong internal quality standards for design, development, and SEO

-- You communicate clearly and directly in English

-- You do not require hand-holding or constant validation



YOUR TEAM

-- Performance-focused digital marketing team

-- Primarily Filipino-based team environment

-- Outcome-driven culture with minimal micromanagement



VETTING PROCESS

-- Paid trial task designed to test autonomy and decision-making

-- Technical and execution assessment

-- Interviews with a tea
mber, the COO, and the CEO

-- You must have a working camera



COMPANY OVERVIEW



Dialed In Web is a performance SEO agency focused on rankings, traffic, calls, and revenue. We operate with high standards, clear accountability, and minimal bureaucracy. Our team values people who think independently, communicate clearly, and take responsibility for results. If you want autonomy, trust, and accountability, this is the environment.

title: Ai Video Creator
description:
We're building a health & wellness content brand that's 100% powered by AI-generated UGC-style videos — talking-head content, B-roll, product showcases — all made with AI, no real creators on camera.

If you already know what it means to generate a realistic AI person, animate them with natural lip-sync, hand gestures, and real emotion using tools like Veo, Kling, Runway, Pika, or HeyGen — keep reading. This role is for you.

You'll work directly with the founder producing short-form vertical videos (TikTok, Reels,
) in the health/wellness/natural remedies niche. Think: scroll-stopping hooks, expressive AI characters, and cinematic B-roll — all generated, not filmed.

This is a long-term, ongoing role with consistent work for the right person.



What You'll Be Doing:



Generating realistic AI talking-head UGC videos from scripts (lip-sync, gestures, facial expressions)

Creating AI B-roll sequences that match specific moods, styles, and visual direction

Building and maintaining consistent AI characters/personas across multiple videos

Writing and refining prompts to get the highest quality output from AI video tools

Working smart with credits — maximizing quality while being efficient with generations

Keeping up with the latest AI video tools, updates, and techniques





You're a Perfect Fit If:



You've already made AI UGC-style videos — not just played with the tools, but actually produced content

You know the difference between a stiff AI generation and one that actually looks natural and alive

You've used Veo (Google Flow), Kling, Runway, Pika, HeyGen, D-ID, or similar tools

You understand short-form content — hooks, pacing, energy, what makes people stop scrolling

You're obsessed with detail — bad lip-sync, weird hands, uncanny valley stuff bothers you

You can work independently, take creative direction, and deliver without hand-holding

Bonus: you've created AI content in the health, wellness, or beauty niche





Job Details:



Type: Part-time to start ? full-time for the right person

Schedule: Flexible hours — output matters, not when you work

Compensation: Competitive, based on experience — discussed with qualified candidates

Location: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)





How to Apply:

I want to see your work, not just your words.



Short intro — who you are, your experience with AI video tools

Show me 1–3 AI-generated UGC videos you've made — Google Drive links, portfolio links, or even screen recordings of your Veo/Kling outputs. This is the most important part.

Tell me which AI video tools you use and which one you get the best results with

Bonus: Drop a link to any social media page or channel where you've posted AI-generated content





Applications without examples of AI video work will not be reviewed. I need to see what you can do — even rough outputs are fine, I just need proof you've actually done this before.



Looking forward to seeing your work

title: Senior Direct Response Copywriter (DTC)
description:
We are one of the fastest-growing DTC brands, generating over 100M+ views across our campaigns.



Now, we’re looking for a copywriter who doesn’t just write ads — but creates angles that print money.



We’re scaling the in-house team that built our current playbook. We don’t follow trends — we set them.



We’re looking for an elite senior direct response copywriter to join our marketing team. This is your chance to work directly with founders, collaborate with top-tier creatives, and produce high-impact campaigns seen by millions.



Top performers will be given opportunities to scale into leadership roles.



YOUR MISSION



Your mission is to consistently produce high-converting, direct-response copy across ads, landing pages, and scripts.



You will be responsible for generating winning angles, hooks, and messaging that drive measurable revenue — not just “good writing.”



RESPONSIBILITIES

Write high-converting ad scripts, hooks, headlines, and primary text for paid social (Meta)

Develop new angles based on customer psychology, pain points, and MARKET AWARENESS LEVELS

Analyze performance data and iterate copy based on what actually converts

Collaborate with video editors and creative strategists to bring ideas to life

Rapidly test variations of messaging to identify winners

Contribute to landing page copy and offer positioning

Maintain brand voice while optimizing for conversion-first communication

Work quickly and efficiently without sacrificing output quality

KPIs YOU WILL OWN

Volume of high-quality concepts/angles produced weekly

Conversion performance of your copy (CTR, CVR, CPA, ROAS)

% of ads/scripts that become spend-scalable winners

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

3+ years of direct response copywriting experience (DTC preferred)

Proven track record of writing winning ads that have scaled spend

Deep understanding of:

Hooks & scroll-stopping mechanisms

Consumer psychology & awareness levels

Offer positioning & objection handling

Experience writing for paid social (Meta)

Ability to think in angles, not just words

Strong analytical mindset — you care about data, not opinions

Excellent written English and clear communication

High agency operator — you don’t need hand-holding

BONUS IF YOU HAVE

Experience in supplements or health DTC

Experience working with creative strategists, video editors, and media buyers

Familiarity with high-volume creative testing environments

Understanding of advertorials / long-form sales pages

OUR TECH STACK

Project Management: Notion

Communication: Slack

Creative Review: 

Ad Platforms: Meta

WHY JOIN OUR BRAND



Performance-Based Rewards

You will be rewarded based on performance + Retainer. If your copy drives revenue, you share in the upside.



High Impact

Your work will directly influence campaigns seen by millions and drive significant revenue.



Work with A-Players

You’ll collaborate with a team that understands direct response at a high level.



High Autonomy

No micromanagement. You own your output.



Growth Trajectory

Top performers can grow into Head of Copy, Creative Strategist, or Brand Lead roles.



Fully Remote

Work from anywhere.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

You focus on “clever writing” over conversion performance

You need constant feedback, direction, or validation

You don’t understand how to write for paid traffic

You avoid data and rely on opinions or “gut feeling”

You prefer slow, polished work over fast iteration and testing

You see this as just a job instead of a skill you want to master

HOW TO APPLY



If you are an elite direct-response copywriter who has produced winning ads before and can prove it, we want to hear from you.



To stand out:



Submit 3–5 examples of ads or campaigns you’ve written that scaled

Briefly explain why they worked

Include the code word: “AnglesWin” in your application



We only review applicants who follow instructions.

title: Virtual Assistant – Property Consultancy
description:
We are a property consultancy operating as part of a larger, established group working across investments, agency, and development. This is not your typical VA role — you will be playing a key part in helping get property deals over the line, working closely with investors, agents, suppliers, and conveyancers on a daily basis.

If you are highly organised, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and want to grow within a dynamic property business, we want to hear from you.



Your Responsibilities



Coordinating and chasing conveyancing processes to ensure deals progress on time

Liaising with investors, estate agents, solicitors, and suppliers on behalf of the team

Managing deal pipelines and keeping records up to date across multiple transactions

Tracking key dates, deadlines, and milestones for live property deals

Preparing and formatting documents, reports, and correspondence

Managing inboxes, calendars, and scheduling meetings across multiple stakeholders

Following up on outstanding actions and keeping all parties accountable

Conducting research on properties, suppliers, or market information as required

Handling general administrative tasks to support the wider team



What We're Looking For



Exceptional organisational skills — this is essential for this role

Strong written and spoken English with a professional communication style

title: Aesthetic Record + GoHighLevel Integration Specialist for Appointment Completion and Automated Review Request Workflows
description:
Do you know how to integrate GoHighLevel with Aesthetic Record for a med spa?



We are seeking a highly experienced integration specialist to connect Aesthetic Record and GoHighLevel for a very specific workflow.



The primary objective is to identify completed appointments inside Aesthetic Record, move the correct patient and appointment data into GoHighLevel, and trigger automated
 review request workflows only after an appointment has actually been completed.



This is not a general CRM setup role.

This is not a beginner automation role.

This is not a role for someone who has only watched tutorials.



You must already have real, hands-on experience working inside both Aesthetic Record and GoHighLevel.



Non-Negotiable Experience Requirements



Applicants will NOT be considered unless they meet all of the following requirements:



Direct prior experience with Aesthetic Record

You must have worked inside the Aesthetic Record platform on live business accounts.

Direct prior experience with GoHighLevel

You must have worked inside GoHighLevel on live business accounts and have built workflows, triggers, custom fields, automations, and contact pipelines.

Direct prior experience connecting Aesthetic Record to GoHighLevel

You must have personally built, managed, tested, or repaired integrations between these two systems, whether through Zapier, Make, webhook workflows, API-related middleware, or a similar proven method.

Proof of prior integration work is mandatory

If you cannot provide proof that you have previously connected Aesthetic Record and GoHighLevel, you are not eligible for this job.

Verifiable implementation experience required

If your experience is only theoretical, training-based, or limited to general CRM automation, you will not be considered.



Important Applicant Filter



If you have not worked with both Aesthetic Record and GoHighLevel before, do not apply.



If you have not previously linked Aesthetic Record and GoHighLevel in a real business environment, do not apply.



If you cannot show proof of past work involving these two platforms together, you are not eligible for this role.



Primary Scope of Work



The specialist hired for this role will be responsible for planning, building, documenting, testing, and verifying a working automation system that does the following:



Core Integration Responsibilities



Review the current setup inside Aesthetic Record

Review the current setup inside GoHighLevel

Determine the most reliable method for passing completed appointment data from Aesthetic Record into GoHighLevel

Identify whether the best trigger comes from appointment completion, checkout, invoice completion, payment completion, visit status, or another confirmed event inside Aesthetic Record

Build the integration using the most stable and scalable method available

Configure any necessary middleware such as Zapier, Make, or webhook routing tools

Create or update required GoHighLevel custom fields

Map patient and appointment data accurately between systems

Configure GoHighLevel workflow triggers based on completed appointment events

Prevent duplicate review request
s

Prevent review requests from firing on cancelled, rescheduled, no-show, or incomplete appointments

Confirm that the workflow only triggers after a legitimate completed appointment

Test the workflow using sample records and real status scenarios

Document the final setup in plain English for future internal reference



Specific Tasks This Person Must Be Able to Perform



Aesthetic Record Tasks



Audit available appointment statuses and workflow trigger points inside Aesthetic Record

Confirm what event represents a truly completed patient visit

Confirm what patient fields and appointment fields can be extracted from Aesthetic Record

Identify how location, provider, service type, appointment status, patient
, phone number, invoice details, and visit completion details can be accessed

Determine whether data should flow from appointment records, encounter records, invoices, or another source

Identify limitations, edge cases, and duplicate-trigger risks within Aesthetic Record



GoHighLevel Tasks



Audit the current sub-account setup

Build or update workflow automations

Create inbound webhook workflow triggers if needed

Create or update custom fields to receive Aesthetic Record data

Map all necessary appointment and contact fields

Create contact tagging logic

Create filtering logic for completed appointments only

Build
 automation logic for review request campaigns

Add safeguards to prevent duplicate sends

Create workflow branches for edge cases

Test workflow execution and verify delivery logic



Integration Tasks



Connect Aesthetic Record to GoHighLevel using a reliable automation method

Configure field mapping between systems

Verify data formatting for
, phone, date, status, provider, and appointment details

Normalize status names if needed

Build filters so only qualifying completed appointments trigger automation

Confirm proper handling of missing
 addresses

Confirm proper handling of duplicate contact records

Confirm proper handling of rescheduled appointments

Confirm proper handling of repeat patients

Confirm proper handling of multiple appointments for the same patient

Confirm workflow timing and delay settings

Verify that the final automation is stable and repeatable



Deliverables Required



The person hired must deliver all of the following:



A full audit summary

A written summary of the current system setup, existing issues, and recommended automation path.

Working integration

A functioning connection between Aesthetic Record and GoHighLevel that sends qualified completed appointment data into GoHighLevel.

Configured workflow

A fully tested GoHighLevel workflow that triggers an
 review request only after a completed appointment.

Field map document

A clear list showing exactly which Aesthetic Record fields map to which GoHighLevel fields.

Logic and exception handling document

A written explanation of:

what counts as completed

what is excluded

how duplicates are prevented

how errors are handled

how no-shows, cancellations, and reschedules are filtered out

Testing proof

Screenshots, screen recordings, or written test logs showing that the automation was tested successfully.

Final documentation

A step-by-step plain-English handoff guide so the setup can be understood and maintained later.



Required Skills



Advanced Aesthetic Record platform experience

Advanced GoHighLevel workflow and automation experience

Strong experience with webhooks

Strong experience with Zapier and/or Make

Strong experience with data mapping and automation logic

Strong understanding of appointment status automation

Strong troubleshooting ability

Ability to document technical setups clearly

Ability to spot logic flaws before launch

Ability to build duplicate prevention logic

Ability to validate trigger timing and workflow reliability



Proof Required From Applicants



Every applicant must provide clear proof of relevant prior work.



Applicants must submit all of the following:



A short written summary of previous projects involving Aesthetic Record and GoHighLevel

A description of the exact automation they built between those systems

The tools used to connect them, such as Zapier, Make, webhook workflows, or API methods

Screenshots, loom video, case study, workflow screenshots, redacted account examples, or other proof of actual implementation

A brief explanation of how they handled completed appointment logic and prevented duplicate automation

title: QuickBooks Online (QBO) Bookkeeper
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and dependable QuickBooks Online (QBO) Bookkeeper to support our growing business. This role is primarily responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, managing day-to-day bookkeeping activities, and ensuring that all financial data within QuickBooks Online is clean, organized, and up to date.



About The Company



Led by Selena Soo, a USA Today bestselling author of Rich Relationships: Create a Million-Dollar Network for Your Business. Through dozens of multi-6 figure and 7-figure launches, Selena has generated over $13 million in revenue in her first 10 years of business. She has also built more than 400 affiliate and referral partnerships.



An expert in publicity, Selena has helped thousands of entrepreneurs land media, in places that include O, The Oprah Magazine, Forbes, Business Insider, and The Drew Barrymore Show.



Our mission is to help visionary people build their brand, reach more people, and change the world.



We offer the energy and excitement of a start-up, along with the opportunity to make a massive impact in the lives of many thousands of people.



Responsibilities include, but are not limited to



Bookkeeping & Financial Management:

— Manage all aspects of QuickBooks Online to ensure accurate and seamless financial operations

— Record daily financial transactions and complete all posting processes with precision

— Ensure proper classification of transactions within the general ledger

— Perform monthly reconciliations for bank accounts and other financial accounts

— Manage accounting inboxes and monitor incoming financial correspondence

— Track late and failed payments and follow up as needed

— Process invoices, payments, and other financial transactions efficiently and on time

— Take full ownership of the cash flow tracker, including daily payment monitoring and accounts receivable tracking

— Manage accounts payable and receivable, including billing, collections, and follow-ups

— Maintain accurate and up-to-date vendor and customer records, ensuring data integrity

— Prepare and generate financial reports, including profit and loss statements, balance sheets, and cash flow reports



Requirements

— Strong hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online (QBO)

— Ability to set up and configure a company in QuickBooks Online from scratch (including chart of accounts, settings, and integrations)

— Solid understanding of bookkeeping principles and financial reporting

— High attention to detail and accuracy

— Ability to work independently and stay organized



Experience with Technology & Tools

— Proficiency in QuickBooks and Stripe

— Proficiency in GSuite (Google Sheets, Docs, Drive) is required

— Familiarity with workflow and project management tools like Asana, Airtable, or Slack is a plus



This is a part-time position to start, with the opportunity to transition into a full-time, virtual role, with hours between 9am–5pm ET.



Work Hours & Expectations

This is a part-time position to start, averaging 10 to 15 hours per week. The ideal candidate is reliable, responsive, and able to manage tasks efficiently within a flexible schedule while meeting deadlines.



Next Steps

If this position sounds like you and you’re jumping for joy at this opportunity, please fill out the Google form:





We will only accept applications submitted through this form. Messages via OnlineJobs.ph will not be considered.

title: Full TIme Customer service Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a skilled, reliable, and proactive Virtual Assistant to provide comprehensive administrative support. You will help manage calendars,
s, social media, expenses, travel arrangements, and various admin tasks for a busy professional.

This is a long-term growth opportunity. We start at approximately 10 hours per week, with the potential to increase up to 20 hours per week (and more as the role and relationship grow). The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, able to work independently, and communicates clearly and proactively.

Key Responsibilities

Calendar Management



Manage and coordinate multiple calendars (initially two iCal calendars + one Google Calendar).

Prevent scheduling conflicts and keep everything accurate and up to date.

Schedule travel, dinners, special events, doctor appointments, lunches, meetings, and other commitments.

Share availability calendars to streamline the scheduling process.



 Management



Fully manage one person’s inbox (personal and business
 accounts).

Prioritize incoming messages and respond in a timely, professional manner.

Required familiarity with Gmail and Outlook.



Social Media Management



Create and schedule engaging content for Instagram, LinkedIn, and
 (potential expansion to TikTok).

Develop social media and blog content using tools like Canva.

Use social media management platforms such as Hootsuite or Buffer.

Help build a consistent online presence and support client funnel development.



Expense Tracking



Track business expenses on a quarterly basis using Excel.

Reconcile expenses with receipts and financial records.

Assist with reconciling outstanding invoice payments quarterly.

Knowledge of QuickBooks is a plus (not required).



Travel Booking & Arrangements



Coordinate travel (flights, hotels, etc.) using provided logins and award account numbers.

Book dinners, special events, doctor appointments, lunches, and other one-off meetings.

Ensure all arrangements are timely and efficient.



General Admin Support



Handle various administrative tasks including writing form letters, developing presentations, conducting research, document management, and data entry.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office or Google Workspace is required.



Qualifications & Requirements



Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant or in a similar administrative/executive support role.

Excellent organizational skills, strong attention to detail, and superior time management.

Outstanding written and verbal communication skills. Please put Happy to be here in the subject line when applying

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision while maintaining open communication.

Proficiency with Gmail, Outlook, Microsoft Office/Google Workspace, and basic scheduling tools.

Experience with social media management and tools like Canva, Hootsuite, or Buffer is strongly preferred.

Familiarity with expense tracking (Excel) and travel booking platforms is a big plus.

Detail-oriented, proactive, and able to prioritize effectively in a fast-moving environment.



Additional Details



This is a remote, independent contractor position (hours are flexible within the week but availability for core tasks is important).

To ensure a great long-term fit, selected candidates will be asked to complete a short personality assessment and a skills quiz.

Long-term growth opportunities are available for the right person who proves reliable and capable.

Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace are required.



How to Apply

To be considered, please reply to this posting with:





Your resume or CV

A short note (3–5 sentences) explaining why you’re a strong fit for this role and what excites you about long-term virtual assistant work



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We review applications quickly and look forward to hearing from organized, dependable professionals ready to grow with us.

title: LinkedIn Growth Strategist - B2B Lead Generation for NEW Corporate Events Agency
description:
Summary

Preference will be given to those who have worked with Event Agencies



Overview

We are a NEW corporate event production agency specializing in government and corporate events where execution, precision, and reliability are critical.



We’re looking for a results-driven LinkedIn Growth Strategist who can turn our LinkedIn presence into a lead generation and authority-building engine as a new agency.



This role goes beyond basic profile optimization. We need someone who understands how to position a brand for corporate decision-makers, create high-performing content, and build a consistent pipeline of qualified B2B leads.



If you know how to combine strategy, content, and relationship-building to drive real business results, we’d love to work with you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



• Transforming our LinkedIn presence into a high-converting personal and brand asset

• Defining clear positioning and messaging that resonates with corporate decision-makers

• Developing and executing a content strategy focused on authority, trust, and lead generation

• Writing high-impact LinkedIn content (insight posts, authority-driven storytelling, carousels)

• Growing a targeted, relevant audience organically (quality over volume)

• Designing and managing outreach strategies that generate qualified conversations (not spam)

• Building relationships and nurturing prospects into opportunities

• Tracking performance and continuously optimizing based on results



What We Are NOT Looking For



• Social media managers focused on posting frequency

• “Growth hackers” using generic or spam-based outreach tactics

• Anyone measuring success purely by likes, views, or follower count



**What We Expect From You**



• Proven experience growing LinkedIn accounts for B2B or service-based businesses

• Strong understanding of corporate buyer psychology and high-trust sales environments

• Ability to translate complex services into clear, compelling messaging

• Experience with LinkedIn tools (Sales Navigator or similar is a plus)

• Data-driven mindset with the ability to analyze and improve performance

• Strong communication and strategic thinking skills



How You Work



• Proactive — you take ownership and don’t wait for direction

• Strategic — you focus on outcomes, not just activity

• Creative — you know how to make content stand out without being gimmicky

• Results-oriented — you care about qualified leads and conversations, not vanity metrics



**Success in This Role Looks Like**



• Consistent inbound interest from corporate decision-makers. We understand that it takes time to build up the pipeline.

• Increased visibility with the *right* audience (not just more followers)

• A clear and differentiated presence in the corporate events space

• A growing pipeline of qualified leads and conversations



---



**Project Details**



Type: 3 Mos Trial Period, est 5-10 hours weekly. There will be bonus potential for closed leads.

Scope: LinkedIn strategy, content, outreach, and growth



**To Apply, Please Include**



• Examples of LinkedIn profiles you’ve optimized or grown (Bonus for Creative/Event Agencies)

• Case studies or proof of results (leads, conversations, revenue impact, not just engagement)

• A brief breakdown of your approach to LinkedIn growth for B2B businesses

• Anything else you find that will be helpful.

title: Engineering Manager (Delivery & Execution)
description:
We are seeking an Engineering manager who can own predictable delivery across engineering by enforcing sprint discipline, decision clarity, and execution standards. Reduce coordination cost, eliminate rework, and ensure that engineering output is reviewable, shippable, and on time.



Core Responsibilities



Sprint Ownership & Delivery Control

• Own sprint planning, execution, and closure

• Enforce sprint scope boundaries (no silent mid-sprint additions)

• Ensure all tickets entering a sprint meet Definition of Ready

• Track and act on: ticket aging, spillover, churn, blocked work

• Move tickets aggressively across states (TODO ? IN PROGRESS ? REVIEW ? DONE)

• Kill zombie tickets



Timebox Enforcement

• Treat timeboxes as coordination contracts, not estimates

• Require proactive communication before a timebox slips

• Block review if timebox standards are violated

• Escalate early, not after the fact



Execution Quality Gates

• Enforce: Definition of Ready (before sprint), Definition of Done (before release)

• Reject work that: contains implicit decisions, lacks acceptance criteria, introduces duplication without approval

• Ensure code review happens before QA

• Ensure QA does not compensate for missing engineering clarity



Decision Discipline (in partnership with TPM / Product)

• Require explicit tracking of: Open Decisions, Frozen Decisions

• Block execution on unresolved architectural decisions

• Ensure decisions are made by the right group, at the right time

• Prevent “decision by implementation”



5. Engineering Standards Enforcement

• Enforce agreed standards consistently: no duplication without approval, no implicit architecture decisions, no skipping ticket states

• Treat violations as delivery risk, not personal issues

• Track repeat violations and escalate



Required Skills & Traits



Must Have

• Strong judgment around delivery tradeoffs

• Comfort enforcing rules and saying “no”

• Ability to stop work and force alignment

• Low tolerance for ambiguity in execution

• Bias for early escalation over late heroics

• Calm under pressure, emotionally neutral

• Experience running sprints that actually ship

• Strong English language skills

• Familiarity with Jira-style workflows



Nice to Have

• Background as senior engineer

• Experience in SaaS / platform teams

• Worked alongside TPMs or Product Managers

title: Product Manager (Technical) / Software Architect
description:
We are seeking a Technical Product Manager / Architect who bridges product design and engineering execution. This role combines system-level thinking, architectural oversight, and clear, actionable documentation—producing deliverables engineers can build from directly. The ideal candidate can translate business needs into architecture diagrams, wireframes, and well-scoped tickets with code-level precision, ensuring efficient handoff and reduced rework.



Requirements & Documentation

• Author architecture-aware product specifications including system diagrams, logic flows, and key technical dependencies.

• Prepare engineer-ready tickets, including pseudocode, scaffolding, or sample API structures.

• Conduct architecture and code reviews, identifying potential design or implementation issues early.

• Build wireframes, mockups, and interaction flows using Figma or equivalent tools to align engineering and UX/UI early in the cycle.

• Collaborate with engineering to ensure technical feasibility and architectural scalability before feature commitment.

Cross-Functional Execution

• Work closely with engineering leads to break down architecture into structured deliverables and sprint-ready tasks.

• Lead technical review sessions to validate assumptions and architecture decisions before coding begins.



Qualifications

• Strong understanding of software architecture principles, REST APIs, and modular system design.

• Hands-on experience writing or reviewing code in PHP, JavaScript, and SQL preferred.

• Proficiency in creating wireframes, prototypes, and UI flows that accurately reflect data and system constraints.

• Ability to evaluate trade-offs between architectural purity, delivery speed, and scalability.

• Prior experience functioning as a bridge between engineering and design, ensuring clarity and readiness for execution.

title: Email Marketing Designer
description:
???? To apply, you must fill out the Google form linked at the bottom of this post. Applications sent any other way will not be reviewed.



MoonCommerce is a boutique
 marketing agency building world-class Klaviyo programs for Shopify brands across fashion, spirits, jewelry, and more. We're small, fast, and obsessive about craft. We're hiring a senior
 designer who cares as much about the comma in the headline as the kerning in the hero.



What you'll do

Design
 campaigns and flows that make people stop scrolling. You'll own the visual output for multiple brands — concepting, designing, and shipping
s in Figma that get built in Klaviyo and sent to hundreds of thousands of subscribers. Every week you're working across different brand worlds: high-end modest fashion one hour, premium whisky the next, streetwear after lunch. You'll partner closely with our copywriters and strategists to turn briefs into
s that actually move revenue.



Who you are

3+ years designing
 marketing specifically. Not "I've done some
s" — real
 design, real campaigns, real results. You understand the medium: the inbox preview, the fold, the mobile-first reality, the dark mode gotchas, the image-to-text ratio, the Klaviyo block structure.

A high-end visual designer with a portfolio that makes us jealous. Typography, hierarchy, restraint, taste. Your
s look like editorial, not like templates.

Figma fluent. It's your home base. You build clean, organized files that hand off without friction.

You get copy. You can read a headline and know if it's working. You'll push back on weak copy instead of just laying it out — and you'll know when a design needs more words or fewer.

You understand
 marketing as a discipline — not just the design side. You know what a flow is, why segmentation matters, and how a hero image affects CTR.



AI in your toolkit. You already use tools like Claude, Midjourney, or Figma AI in your workflow. You don't need to be an AI expert — but if you're skeptical or resistant, this isn't the role. Our entire design pipeline runs on AI, and you'll be plugging into it.

Available during Israel working hours. Wherever you're based, your workday overlaps with ours. This is non-negotiable — we move fast and need you in the room (even if the room is Slack).

A go-getter. Nobody's going to hand you a brief with every answer. You figure it out, ask the right questions, and ship.



Our core values — these aren't wall decoration

Unreasonable Hospitality — We treat clients like guests at our dinner table.

Design + Details — The details are the design. Pixel-level care, every time.

Extreme Ownership — No blame, no excuses. You own the outcome.

Relentlessly Resourceful — Stuck is a choice. Figure it out.

Clarity is King — Say what you mean. Clear is kind.



If you read those and nodded, keep reading. If you rolled your eyes, this isn't for you.

Why you'll love working here



Real craft, real impact. We're small enough that your work ships without getting watered down by committee. What you design on Monday is in hundreds of thousands of inboxes by Friday.

Brands worth designing for. Our clients actually care about how their
s look. No "just make the logo bigger" energy. You'll build a portfolio you're proud of.

AI-forward, not AI-gimmicky. We've built a real AI design pipeline that makes you faster and sharper — not one that replaces taste. You'll get to work with tools most agencies haven't even heard of yet.

A team that sweats the details. Everyone here — copywriters, strategists, ops — cares as much about the work as you do. No dragging anyone along.

Direct feedback, fast growth. We tell you what's working and what isn't. No politics, no guessing where you stand. If you want to level up quickly, this is the place.

Flexibility with accountability. Work from wherever, during Israel hours. We care about output, not seat time.



How to apply

The only way to apply is through our Google form:

title: Hiring high-volume cold caller/outbound sales w/ GHL Experience Hourly + Bonus Real Estate Sub Niche
description:
BASE SALARY + BONUS PER CLOSED/PAID AGREEMENT



This is a performance-based outbound role.

You are expected to handle conversations, build trust, and move prospects toward signed agreements.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR:



Beginners

Low-volume callers

People looking for “task-based” work

Anyone uncomfortable with high rejection

Anyone uncomfortable working under KPI management

Anyone uncomfortable with cold calling



If you are not a disciplined, high-output caller, this will not be a fit.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Make high-volume outbound calls using GHL Power Dialer

Maintain 60–80+ dials per hour consistently (adjusted for meaningful conversations)

Call fresh leads first, then aggressively manage follow-ups

Speak with distressed homeowners

Build trust quickly and move conversations toward action

Handle objections confidently but emotionally mindful

Push for signed agreements or clear next steps (like scheduling with a closer until you are comfortable getting signed agreements on your own for larger bonus payout)

Manage callbacks and pipeline daily



This is real cold calling.

You are expected to drive outcomes, not just complete calls.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS



Full workday or shift consistency (no gaps, no disappearing)

Strong follow-up discipline (no missed opportunities)

Proactive communication (no excuses, no delays)

Ownership of results — not just activity

1 Signed Agreement per week minimum for part time individuals, or 2 Signed Agreements per week minimum for full time individuals (or 5 appointments for closers per week for part time or 10 appointments for closers per week full time hours)



If you hit dial numbers but do not manage your pipeline, this is not a fit.



SCHEDULE

20 hours/week to start

Must work U.S. evening hours (EST)

Evening / Weekend availability preferred (this is when most leads answer the phone = signed agreements)

Fast path to full-time for strong performers



COMPENSATION

Hourly pay (based on experience)

Bonus per closed case (company has received payment from courts/attorney)--- minimum $250.00 USD each

Additional performance incentives

Long-term opportunity for top performers



This role is designed for people who want to earn more by performing.



IDEAL CANDIDATE

1. Fluent in English

2. Experienced in cold calling, collections, real estate, or financial hardship

3. Comfortable making 300–600+ dials per full shift pace

4. Has used GHL Power Dialer

5. Emotionally intelligent and confident on the phone but sensitive to the potential client's situation

6. Highly disciplined and consistent

7. Thinks in terms of results, not tasks (for example, if you tell me you have called all of your new leads and need direction to go through your follow-ups, this is not for you).

8. Have good internet connection and  headset to cancel background noise



TO BE CONSIDERED — ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS:



1. What is your average daily dial volume in past roles?

2. What experience do you have using GHL Power Dialer?

3.. What is your availability in EST hours?

4. If given 300 new/fresh leads today, how would you work them over the next 3 days while still managing leads in follow-up pipeline?

5. Any proof of conversion rates? Closed deals?

6. Walk me through exactly what you do in the first hour of a shift when you receive fresh leads. Be specific.

7. If a prospect says “I need to talk to my husband/wife,” what do you say next?

8. How many active clients are you currently working with, and how many hours per week are you committing to each? (The context to this question is I have had a couple of recent candidates commit to 4 -5 companies full time hours each which is absolutely impossible. I would prefer someone who could work less hours but, be dedicated and disciplined during their shift).

title: Experienced E-commerce Dispute Manager

Experience working with fashion e-commerce brands is highly preferred. If you know how to handle the specific types of disputes that happen in the fashion niche, you'll be at the top of our list.



What You'll Do:

Put together strong evidence (tracking info, customer
s, policies) to win "Not Received" and "Not As Described" cases.



Help us keep our overall dispute rates as low as possible.



Application Questions (Please answer these in your message):



Which payment gateways are you most experienced with? What is your average win rate?



Walk me through exactly how you fight a "Product Not Received" chargeback. What proof do you send?



Do you have experience handling customer support or disputes for fashion e-commerce stores? Please share a bit about it.



What is the maximum number of disputes you have successfully handled in a single day?



Why are you the right expert for this job?



How to Apply:

Start your application with the words "DISPUTE EXPERT" so we know you pay attention to details, and include your answers to the 5 questions above.

description:

Account Manager

Greetings from Local Visibility - your future workplace filled with positivity and endless possibilities! We are seeking talented account managers to join our dynamic team!



About Us:

Local Visibility is a growing digital marketing agency specializing in lead generation for home improvement and service companies in the US and Canada. We have been in business for 14 years and take pride in providing high-quality services.

Team harmony: Your wins are ours, and together, we create a harmonious work environment where your efforts and ideas truly shine.

Grow with us: Being with us means your journey is always exciting! Our goal is to give you the tools, help, and chances to move your career forward.

Celebrating YOU: Birthdays, small wins, or achievements - it’s important to celebrate the good things. We love acknowledging and appreciating each other.



Job Overview

The Account Manager is crucial for ensuring customer satisfaction and retention by fostering strong relationships, understanding client needs, and facilitating effective communication between clients and internal teams. As an account manager, you are responsible for managing the relationships with clients. They must speak English fluently without an accent. Additionally, the candidate must be presentable, as this is a client-facing role, and should have a strong background working with American clients.



The position includes:



Customer Relationship Management: Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with clients. Regularly communicate with clients to understand their needs, address concerns, and provide solutions.



Account Management: Understand the client's business objectives, industry challenges, and pain points to tailor solutions and offerings effectively.

 Ads, Semrush, Bright Local, AdWords, Analytics).

Responsible for handling incoming calls and providing support or assistance as needed.

Document customer service requests and follow through on open items for clients.

Follow up on customer service requests weekly to ensure they are in progress and close the loop with clients.



Required Qualifications

Must be able to speak English without an accent and demonstrate strong verbal and written communication skills required to convey information.

Must have prior experience in customer service, phone sales, or account management for a marketing agency.

Must be able to demonstrate knowledge of digital marketing, including SEO, PPC, and Social Media

Must have a reliable internet connection with a backup option and a quiet, distraction-free working environment.

Must have prior experience working the night shift (8 am to 5 pm Eastern time).

You know this about yourself:

You are very intelligent and quick-witted (your mouth might get you in trouble every once in a while)

You are very detail-oriented, organized, and analytical

You are a people person who is outgoing and friendly. People like being around you and think you are funny.

You always look for the good and positive in things, even when bad things happen.

You are honest and genuine.

You are not very good at working with your hands or fixing things.

You don't like to take risks.

title: Commission-Based Sales Representative - Smart Websites, CRM & Lead Automation & More (remote)
description:
We are looking for a confident and motivated salesperson to call potential clients, present our services, and help close deals. You will be selling smart websites, CRM systems, automations, lead management tools, booking systems, landing pages, forms, and other services included in our ONE BMT all-in-one business platform designed for small businesses.



This is a commission-based role. Commission starts from £29 per product and goes up to £200+ one-time per deal, depending on the service sold and the signed agreement. Commission is paid once the agreement is signed and the client has paid the deposit.



In addition, for subscription-based services such as CRM and other monthly paid services, you will receive 10% recurring commission each month from every client you sign, at the beginning of each month, for as long as that client remains active and continues paying for the service.



You can either bring your own clients or call through our database of businesses that may need our services. We are looking for someone who is confident on the phone, comfortable speaking with business owners, and focused on turning conversations into signed deals.

title: Channel Discovery Manager
description:
Hi there,



We’re Hellamaid, a fast-growing home cleaning brand operating across Canada and the U.S., with Toronto as one of our core markets.



We’re hiring a Channel Discovery Manager to actively find and test new ways people discover, discuss, and trust local service brands online.



This is not an SEO role.

This is not content writing.

This is not social media posting for aesthetics.



This role is hands-on. You will test channels, engage where appropriate, and prove what works.



Compensation & Stability



Salary: 40,000 – 60,000 pesos per month (based on experience and execution)

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours per week

Payments: Weekly via Wise

Stability: Long-term role for strong performers



Your Role



You will be responsible for finding and validating new discovery channels.



1) Channel Testing (Hands-On)

Actively explore and test online spaces where people discuss cleaning, home services, pricing, and trust.

Run small, low-risk experiments such as replies, posts, or participation in discussions.

Follow community rules and avoid promotion or spam at all times.



2) Channel Evaluation

Evaluate channels based on engagement quality, relevance, and early trust signals.

D
 quickly what to continue testing and what to stop.



3) Documentation & Handoff

Document what works in short, clear playbooks.

Hand off validated channels to the appropriate tea
mber for scaling.



4) City Awareness

Pay attention to local dynamics, especially in Toronto.

Note patterns or concerns that are city-specific and worth addressing elsewhere.



What We’re Looking For

- Curious and comfortable experimenting in public spaces

- Strong written English and clear communication

- Good judgment and respect for online communities

- Bias toward action over theory

- Not attached to ideas that don’t work

- Experience with forums, Reddit, community platforms, or growth experimentation is a strong plus.



Working Setup

- Fully remote

- Must overlap with EST hours

- Clear expectations and fast feedback



How to Apply

Please send:

1) A short summary of your experience testing or discovering new channels

2) Examples of experiments or community interactions you’ve run

3) A short Loom video (2-3 minutes) explaining how you would test a new channel responsibly



In your application, answer this question:

How do you know when a channel is worth continuing versus killing.



(Only qualified candidates will be contacted)

title: AI Operations Specialist
description:
AI Operations Specialist — Medical Practice



Full-time / Part-time



About the role



We are a regenerative medicine and pain management clinic based in the United States seeking a highly skilled AI Operations Specialist to join our remote team. This is a hands-on role where you will use AI tools daily to automate billing workflows, manage prior authorizations, and support our outreach to referring medical practices and aesthetic clients.



This is not an entry-level position. You must be able to demonstrate real, working examples of AI automations you have built or managed.



What you will do



Medical billing automation — use AI tools to streamline claims submission, follow-ups, and denial management workflows.



Prior authorization support — research and submit PAs using templated AI-assisted workflows, track status, and flag urgent cases.



Daily outreach automation — build and manage automated
 sequences targeting referring physicians, Hydrafacial clients, and laser hair removal clients using tools like 
, Zapier, or n8n paired with an AI writing layer.



Marketing execution — identify and deploy tools for reaching other medical practices (PCP, orthopedic, pain clinics) to grow our referral base.



Instagram content production — create animated story ads and carousel explainer ads tailored to our aesthetic services using AI-assisted design tools. Must understand Instagram ad formats, aspect ratios, and engagement best practices natively.



Process documentation — write and maintain SOPs for every automation you build so the clinic can run without you as a single point of failure.



Required — Instagram ad experience (non-negotiable)



Applicants must have hands-on experience producing Instagram animated story ads and carousel explainer ads. You must understand native Instagram ad formats, safe zones, motion principles for short-form content, and how to use AI tools (such as Canva AI, Adobe Express, CapCut, or Runway or Claude) to produce these at scale. Portfolio samples are mandatory — applications without Instagram ad examples will not be reviewed.

Required skills — must show proof



ChatGPT / Claude


 or Zapier

n8n (bonus)

 automation (Instantly, Smartlead, Mailchimp)

CRM tools (GoHighLevel, HubSpot)

Google Sheets + AI formulas

Prompt engineering

Instagram animated story ads

Carousel explainer ads

Canva AI / CapCut / Runway

Medical billing familiarity (non-negotiable)

When applying, you must include: (1) a screen recording or screenshots of an AI automation you built, (2) at least two Instagram ad samples — one animated story and one carousel — from past work, and (3) a short paragraph explaining the tools used for each. Applications without all three will not be reviewed.

Nice to have



Experience working with US healthcare or medical clinics. Familiarity with HIPAA-safe data handling practices. Experience with prior authorization portals (Availity, NaviNet, or payer portals). Experience running paid Instagram ad campaigns, not just producing creative assets.



What we offer



Fully remote, flexible schedule aligned with US Eastern Time. Stable long-term engagement with room to grow.  Opportunity to own and expand the AI operations function as the clinic scales.

title: Growth & Lead Generation Marketer (Multi-Brand)
description:
Job Title: Growth & Lead Generation Manager (Multi-Brand)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)



Salary: £700 GBP / month (Starting Base) + Performance Bonuses Hours: Full-Time (40 hours/week) | Shift: Must overlap with UK Business Hours (9 AM – 5 PM UK)



About the Role

We are a high-growth UK Property Group operating 4 distinct brands: Lettings, Property Sourcing, Refurbishment, and a Personal Brand. We are looking for a Revenue-Driver, not just a "social media poster."



Your mission is to build and manage a predictable engine that generates motivated seller leads and investor enquiries. You will own the "Top of the Funnel" and ensure our brands are visible, trusted, and consistently attracting new business.



The 7-Department Context

In our organization, you own Department 2 (Marketing & Sales) and Department 6 (Public Relations). You will work directly under our Operations Director to ensure our lead pipeline is always full.



Core Responsibilities

Multi-Brand Strategy: Coordinate and execute marketing across 4 brands, ensuring each has a distinct voice and consistent lead-capture mechanisms.



Lead Generation (Outbound/Inbound): * Implement outreach campaigns (Direct mail,
/LinkedIn groups, and community engagement) to find property deals.



Manage the sales funnel: Move prospects from "Stranger" to "Lead" to "Booked Call" for the CEO.



Content & Social Media Oversight: Manage the creative workflow to ensure all content (Reels, Posts, Newsletters) is high-quality and, most importantly, drives traffic.



PR & Reputation: Actively seek podcast guest spots or press opportunities for the CEO and systematically collect 5-star reviews and video testimonials from our clients.



Data Tracking: Provide a weekly report on "Cost Per Lead" and conversion rates. You must be obsessed with the numbers that lead to revenue.



Paid ads management:  Mate/ Google



Requirements

Proven Lead Gen Experience: You have a track record of generating actual business leads, not just "likes" or "followers."



Strategic Copywriting: Ability to write persuasive, "hooky" text that drives action.



Multi-Tasking: Ability to juggle 4 brands without losing focus or quality.



Tech Savvy: Familiar with Canva, Meta Business Suite, CRM tools, and AI for content efficiency.



The Non-Negotiables

Extreme Ownership: You don't wait to be told what to do; you bring ideas and solutions to the table.



Polish & Professionalism: You represent our brands. Your written English must be flawless.



How to Apply (MANDATORY TEST)

We hire for meticulous attention to detail and results. If you miss these steps, your application will be ignored:



 Subject: "Lead Gen Manager: I Grow Brands"

 to help us scale? Get in touch today.

title: Senior E-commerce Store Manager (Fashion Dropshipping |  Experience Required)
description:
We are an aggressively scaling e-commerce company searching for an elite, highly organized Store Manager to oversee our daily operations. We specialize in high-volume fashion dropshipping, and we need an operational powerhouse who has already "been there and done that" at the highest levels.



This is not a role for a beginner or an entry-level virtual assistant. You must be a strategic operator who knows how to keep the machine running smoothly while we focus on growth. If you have not managed fashion dropshipping stores generating at least $1,000,000 in monthly revenue, please save your time and do not apply.



Your Responsibilities:



Total Store Oversight: Manage the day-to-day operations of high-volume Shopify fashion stores.



Team Leadership: Oversee customer service teams, media buyers, and virtual assistants to ensure KPIs are met across the board.



Fulfillment & Supply Chain: Coordinate closely with suppliers to ensure order fulfillment, handle logistics escalations, and maintain strict quality control.



System Optimization: Create, implement, and refine Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to maximize team efficiency and automate repetitive tasks.



Performance Tracking: Monitor daily metrics (conversion rates, fulfillment times, refund rates) and report directly to stakeholders.



Requirements:



Extensive, undeniable experience managing large-scale Shopify stores specifically in the fashion dropshipping niche.



A proven track record of managing operations for brands generating $1M+ in monthly revenue.



Exceptional organizational skills and a mastery of project management tools (e.g., Asana, ClickUp, Notion, Slack).



Deep understanding of the dropshipping ecosystem, from supplier negotiations to payment gateway risk management.



MANDATORY APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY):



We do not hire based on promises; we hire based on proof. To be considered for this executive-level role, your application MUST include all of the following:



Revenue Proof: You must provide verified screenshots/dashboards demonstrating your experience managing stores with a minimum of $1,000,000 in monthly revenue.



Store Portfolio: You must list the exact names and URLs of the fashion dropshipping stores you have previously managed.



Workflow & Operational Proof: You must provide concrete examples of your daily workflows. Attach screenshots, Loom videos, or PDF exports of your actual task trackers, daily checklists, or SOPs that you have built and utilized in past roles.



Note: Applications missing the revenue screenshots, the store URLs, or the workflow examples will be instantly rejected.



To prove you have strong attention to detail and have read this entire post, please start your application with the exact phrase: "scale".
